```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 (Ultimate Edition)</title>
    
    <!-- FONTLAR VE İKONLAR -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=VT323&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Press+Start+2P&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Black+Ops+One&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto+Mono&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Audiowide&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bungee+Shade&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Monoton&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fredoka+One&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Permanent+Marker&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lobster&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Pacifico&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Creepster&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">

    <!-- HARİCİ JS KÜTÜPHANELERİ -->
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/chroma-js/2.4.2/chroma.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@jaames/iro@5/dist/iro.min.js"></script>

    <style>
        /* --- CSS BAŞLANGICI --- */
        :root {
            --bg-dark: #0a192f; --bg-medium: #112240; --bg-light: #233554;
            --text-primary: #ccd6f6; --text-secondary: #8892b0; --accent-color: #64ffda;
            --accent-hover: #7fffe9; --accent-secondary: #ffcc66; --border-color: #1a3b5c;
            --code-bg: #0e1f3a; --success-color: #64ffda; --reset-color: #ff79b0;
            --border-radius: 5px; --glow: 0 0 10px rgba(100, 255, 218, 0.3);
        }

        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
        body { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; background-color: var(--bg-dark); color: var(--text-primary); padding: 15px; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
        
        /* Layout */
        .container { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 350px 1fr; gap: 20px; max-width: 1800px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%; flex-grow: 1; }
        
        /* Sidebar Controls */
        .controls { background-color: var(--bg-medium); padding: 20px; border-radius: var(--border-radius); overflow-y: auto; max-height: calc(100vh - 30px); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); }
        .controls::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
        .controls::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border-color); border-radius: 4px; }
        
        fieldset { border: 1px solid var(--border-color); padding: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-radius: var(--border-radius); background: var(--bg-light); }
        legend { color: var(--accent-secondary); font-weight: bold; padding: 0 10px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
        legend:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); }
        
        .form-group { margin-bottom: 12px; }
        label { display: block; font-size: 0.85em; color: var(--accent-color); margin-bottom: 4px; }
        
        input[type="text"], input[type="number"], select, textarea {
            width: 100%; padding: 8px; background: var(--bg-dark); border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            color: var(--text-primary); border-radius: 3px; font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace;
        }
        input[type="range"] { width: 100%; cursor: pointer; }
        
        /* Renk Seçiciler */
        .color-picker-wrapper { margin-top: 10px; display: flex; justify-content: center; }

        /* Butonlar */
        button {
            width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 5px; cursor: pointer;
            background: var(--bg-dark); border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            color: var(--text-primary); border-radius: var(--border-radius);
            transition: 0.3s; font-weight: 600; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;
        }
        button:hover { background: var(--bg-medium); border-color: var(--accent-color); color: var(--accent-color); }
        button:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
        
        .btn-chaos { background: linear-gradient(45deg, #6a11cb, #2575fc); border: none; color: white; }
        .btn-chaos:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 15px #6a11cb; transform: scale(1.02); }
        .btn-reset { background: var(--reset-color); color: #000; border: none; }
        
        /* Preview Area */
        .preview-area { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; position: sticky; top: 20px; }
        
        #preview-box {
            background-color: white; color: #333; min-height: 300px; padding: 40px;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            border-radius: var(--border-radius); font-size: 24px; text-align: center;
            border: 2px dashed var(--border-color); transition: 0.3s;
            position: relative; overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }
        #preview-box::after { content: 'Önizleme Alanı'; position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; font-size: 10px; opacity: 0.5; color: #000; }
        
        /* CSS Output */
        .output-section { background: var(--bg-medium); padding: 15px; border-radius: var(--border-radius); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); }
        #css-output {
            height: 200px; background: var(--code-bg); color: var(--accent-secondary);
            border: none; padding: 15px; font-family: 'Fira Code', monospace; resize: vertical;
        }
        
        .action-buttons { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px; }
        
        @media (max-width: 900px) { .container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .preview-area { position: static; } }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="container">
    <!-- SOL PANEL: KONTROLLER -->
    <aside class="controls">
        <h2 style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px; color: var(--accent-color);">
            <i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i> K3N4N V8.0
        </h2>

        <div class="action-buttons" style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
            <button onclick="undo()" id="btnUndo" disabled><i class="fas fa-undo"></i></button>
            <button onclick="redo()" id="btnRedo" disabled><i class="fas fa-redo"></i></button>
            <button class="btn-reset" onclick="resetAll()"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Sıfırla</button>
        </div>

        <fieldset>
            <legend onclick="toggleFieldset(this)"><i class="fas fa-font"></i> Metin Ayarları</legend>
            <div class="content">
                <button onclick="randomTextStyles()"><i class="fas fa-random"></i> Rastgele Metin</button>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Yazı Tipi</label>
                    <select id="fontFamily" onchange="updateStyles()">
                        <option value="'Poppins', sans-serif">Poppins (Modern)</option>
                        <option value="'VT323', monospace">VT323 (Piksel)</option>
                        <option value="'Press Start 2P', cursive">Game (Oyun)</option>
                        <option value="'Orbitron', sans-serif">Orbitron (Fütüristik)</option>
                        <option value="'Black Ops One', cursive">Military (Askeri)</option>
                        <option value="'Creepster', cursive">Creepster (Korku)</option>
                        <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Pacifico (El Yazısı)</option>
                        <option value="'Monoton', cursive">Monoton (Retro)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Boyut (px)</label>
                    <input type="number" id="fontSize" value="24" oninput="updateStyles()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Metin Rengi</label>
                    <div id="color-text" class="color-picker-wrapper"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Hizalama</label>
                    <select id="textAlign" onchange="updateStyles()">
                        <option value="center">Ortala</option>
                        <option value="left">Sola</option>
                        <option value="right">Sağa</option>
                        <option value="justify">Yasla</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
        </fieldset>

        <fieldset>
            <legend onclick="toggleFieldset(this)"><i class="fas fa-fill-drip"></i> Arka Plan & Sınırlar</legend>
            <div class="content">
                <button onclick="randomBackground()"><i class="fas fa-random"></i> Rastgele Arka Plan</button>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Arka Plan Rengi</label>
                    <div id="color-bg" class="color-picker-wrapper"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Border Radius (Köşe)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="borderRadius" value="10px" oninput="updateStyles()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Çerçeve (Border)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="border" placeholder="örn: 2px solid red" oninput="updateStyles()">
                </div>
                 <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Padding (İç Boşluk)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="padding" value="20px" oninput="updateStyles()">
                </div>
            </div>
        </fieldset>

        <fieldset>
            <legend onclick="toggleFieldset(this)"><i class="fas fa-magic"></i> Efektler & Gölgeler</legend>
            <div class="content">
                <button onclick="randomEffects()"><i class="fas fa-magic"></i> Rastgele Efekt</button>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Kutu Gölgesi (Box Shadow)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="boxShadow" placeholder="örn: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)" oninput="updateStyles()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Metin Gölgesi (Text Shadow)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="textShadow" placeholder="örn: 2px 2px 4px #000" oninput="updateStyles()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Filtre (Filter)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="filter" placeholder="örn: blur(5px) contrast(1.2)" oninput="updateStyles()">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Transform</label>
                    <input type="text" id="transform" placeholder="örn: rotate(5deg) scale(1.1)" oninput="updateStyles()">
                </div>
            </div>
        </fieldset>
        
        <fieldset>
             <legend onclick="toggleFieldset(this)"><i class="fas fa-bolt"></i> Gelişmiş / Animasyon</legend>
             <div class="content">
                 <button onclick="applyGlassmorphism()"><i class="fas fa-glass-martini"></i> Glassmorphism</button>
                 <button onclick="applyNeumorphism()"><i class="fas fa-circle"></i> Neumorphism</button>
                 <button onclick="applyGlitch()"><i class="fas fa-bug"></i> Glitch Efekti</button>
                 <div class="form-group" style="margin-top:10px;">
                     <label>Animasyon Kodu (@keyframes)</label>
                     <textarea id="animationKeyframes" rows="4" placeholder="@keyframes anim { ... }" oninput="updateStyles()"></textarea>
                 </div>
                 <div class="form-group">
                     <label>Animasyon Ayarı</label>
                     <input type="text" id="animation" placeholder="örn: anim 2s infinite alternate" oninput="updateStyles()">
                 </div>
             </div>
        </fieldset>

        <button class="btn-chaos" onclick="totalChaos()"><i class="fas fa-meteor"></i> TOTAL CHAOS (Rastgele)</button>

    </aside>

    <!-- SAĞ PANEL: ÖNİZLEME VE ÇIKTI -->
    <main class="preview-area">
        <div id="preview-box">
            K3N4N CSS V8.0<br>Ultimate Generator
        </div>

        <div class="output-section">
            <h4 style="color: var(--accent-color); margin-bottom: 10px;"><i class="fas fa-code"></i> CSS Çıktısı</h4>
            <textarea id="css-output" readonly></textarea>
            <div class="action-buttons">
                <button onclick="copyCSS()" style="background: var(--success-color); color:#000;"><i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Kopyala</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>
</div>

<!-- JAVASCRIPT KODLARI BURADA BAŞLIYOR -->
<script>
    // --- DEĞİŞKENLER VE AYARLAR ---
    const previewBox = document.getElementById('preview-box');
    const cssOutput = document.getElementById('css-output');
    
    // Geçmiş (Undo/Redo) Sistemi
    let history = [];
    let historyIndex = -1;
    let isInternalUpdate = false; // Döngüyü engellemek için

    // Renk Seçicileri (Iro.js)
    let colorPickerText, colorPickerBg;

    // --- BAŞLATMA FONKSİYONU ---
    window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        // Text Color Picker
        colorPickerText = new iro.ColorPicker("#color-text", { width: 150, color: "#333333", layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'hue' } }, { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'value' } }] });
        colorPickerText.on('input:end', function(color) { updateStyles(); });

        // Bg Color Picker
        colorPickerBg = new iro.ColorPicker("#color-bg", { width: 150, color: "#ffffff", layout: [{ component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'hue' } }, { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'saturation' } }, { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'value' } }] });
        colorPickerBg.on('input:end', function(color) { updateStyles(); });

        // İlk durumu kaydet
        saveHistory();
        updateOutput();
    });

    // --- ANA GÜNCELLEME FONKSİYONU ---
    function updateStyles() {
        if (isInternalUpdate) return;

        // Inputlardan değerleri al
        const fontFamily = document.getElementById('fontFamily').value;
        const fontSize = document.getElementById('fontSize').value + 'px';
        const textAlign = document.getElementById('textAlign').value;
        const color = colorPickerText.color.hexString;
        const bgColor = colorPickerBg.color.hexString;
        const borderRadius = document.getElementById('borderRadius').value;
        const border = document.getElementById('border').value;
        const padding = document.getElementById('padding').value;
        const boxShadow = document.getElementById('boxShadow').value;
        const textShadow = document.getElementById('textShadow').value;
        const filter = document.getElementById('filter').value;
        const transform = document.getElementById('transform').value;
        
        // Animasyon
        const animation = document.getElementById('animation').value;
        const keyframes = document.getElementById('animationKeyframes').value;

        // Stilleri Uygula
        previewBox.style.fontFamily = fontFamily;
        previewBox.style.fontSize = fontSize;
        previewBox.style.textAlign = textAlign;
        previewBox.style.color = color;
        previewBox.style.backgroundColor = bgColor;
        previewBox.style.borderRadius = borderRadius;
        previewBox.style.border = border;
        previewBox.style.padding = padding;
        previewBox.style.boxShadow = boxShadow;
        previewBox.style.textShadow = textShadow;
        previewBox.style.filter = filter;
        previewBox.style.transform = transform;
        previewBox.style.animation = animation;

        // Keyframes için <style> tag yönetimi
        let styleTag = document.getElementById('dynamic-keyframes');
        if (!styleTag) {
            styleTag = document.createElement('style');
            styleTag.id = 'dynamic-keyframes';
            document.head.appendChild(styleTag);
        }
        styleTag.innerHTML = keyframes;

        updateOutput();
        saveHistory();
    }

    // --- CSS ÇIKTISI OLUŞTURMA ---
    function updateOutput() {
        const style = previewBox.style;
        const keyframes = document.getElementById('animationKeyframes').value;
        
        let css = `#preview-box {\n`;
        if(style.fontFamily) css += `    font-family: ${style.fontFamily};\n`;
        if(style.fontSize) css += `    font-size: ${style.fontSize};\n`;
        if(style.color) css += `    color: ${style.color};\n`;
        if(style.backgroundColor) css += `    background-color: ${style.backgroundColor};\n`;
        if(style.textAlign) css += `    text-align: ${style.textAlign};\n`;
        if(style.borderRadius) css += `    border-radius: ${style.borderRadius};\n`;
        if(style.border) css += `    border: ${style.border};\n`;
        if(style.padding) css += `    padding: ${style.padding};\n`;
        if(style.boxShadow) css += `    box-shadow: ${style.boxShadow};\n`;
        if(style.textShadow) css += `    text-shadow: ${style.textShadow};\n`;
        if(style.filter) css += `    filter: ${style.filter};\n`;
        if(style.transform) css += `    transform: ${style.transform};\n`;
        if(style.animation) css += `    animation: ${style.animation};\n`;
        css += `}`;

        if (keyframes.trim() !== "") {
            css += `\n\n/* Animasyonlar */\n${keyframes}`;
        }

        cssOutput.value = css;
    }

    // --- RASTGELE OLUŞTURUCULAR (CHAOS LOGIC) ---
    function randomInt(min, max) { return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min; }
    function randomColor() { return chroma.random().hex(); }

    function randomTextStyles() {
        const fonts = ["'VT323'", "'Poppins'", "'Orbitron'", "'Press Start 2P'", "'Creepster'", "'Pacifico'"];
        document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = fonts[randomInt(0, fonts.length - 1)] + ", sans-serif";
        document.getElementById('fontSize').value = randomInt(16, 60);
        colorPickerText.color.hexString = randomColor();
        updateStyles();
    }

    function randomBackground() {
        colorPickerBg.color.hexString = randomColor();
        document.getElementById('borderRadius').value = randomInt(0, 50) + (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 'px' : '%');
        document.getElementById('border').value = `${randomInt(1, 10)}px ${Math.random() > 0.5 ? 'solid' : 'dashed'} ${randomColor()}`;
        updateStyles();
    }

    function randomEffects() {
        const shadowColor = chroma(randomColor()).alpha(0.5).css();
        document.getElementById('boxShadow').value = `0 ${randomInt(5,20)}px ${randomInt(10,50)}px ${shadowColor}`;
        document.getElementById('textShadow').value = `${randomInt(1,5)}px ${randomInt(1,5)}px 0px ${randomColor()}`;
        document.getElementById('transform').value = `rotate(${randomInt(-10, 10)}deg) scale(${Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.8})`;
        updateStyles();
    }

    // --- ÖZEL PRESETLER ---
    function applyGlassmorphism() {
        isInternalUpdate = true;
        colorPickerBg.color.set('rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)');
        document.getElementById('boxShadow').value = "0 8px 32px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.37)";
        document.getElementById('border').value = "1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18)";
        document.getElementById('filter').value = "backdrop-filter: blur(4px)"; // Not: CSS output'ta manuel düzeltme gerekebilir
        document.getElementById('borderRadius').value = "10px";
        isInternalUpdate = false;
        updateStyles();
    }

    function applyNeumorphism() {
        isInternalUpdate = true;
        colorPickerBg.color.set('#e0e0e0');
        colorPickerText.color.set('#333');
        document.getElementById('boxShadow').value = "20px 20px 60px #bebebe, -20px -20px 60px #ffffff";
        document.getElementById('borderRadius').value = "50px";
        document.getElementById('border').value = "none";
        isInternalUpdate = false;
        updateStyles();
    }

    function applyGlitch() {
        isInternalUpdate = true;
        document.getElementById('animation').value = "glitch 1s infinite";
        document.getElementById('animationKeyframes').value = 
`@keyframes glitch {
  0% { transform: translate(0) }
  20% { transform: translate(-2px, 2px) }
  40% { transform: translate(-2px, -2px) }
  60% { transform: translate(2px, 2px) }
  80% { transform: translate(2px, -2px) }
  100% { transform: translate(0) }
}`;
        isInternalUpdate = false;
        updateStyles();
    }

    function totalChaos() {
        randomTextStyles();
        randomBackground();
        randomEffects();
        // Ekstra kaos
        if(Math.random() > 0.5) applyGlitch();
    }

    function resetAll() {
        isInternalUpdate = true;
        document.getElementById('fontFamily').value = "'Poppins', sans-serif";
        document.getElementById('fontSize').value = "24";
        document.getElementById('textAlign').value = "center";
        document.getElementById('borderRadius').value = "10px";
        document.getElementById('border').value = "";
        document.getElementById('padding').value = "20px";
        document.getElementById('boxShadow').value = "";
        document.getElementById('textShadow').value = "";
        document.getElementById('filter').value = "";
        document.getElementById('transform').value = "";
        document.getElementById('animation').value = "";
        document.getElementById('animationKeyframes').value = "";
        colorPickerText.color.set('#333333');
        colorPickerBg.color.set('#ffffff');
        isInternalUpdate = false;
        updateStyles();
    }

    // --- GEÇMİŞ YÖNETİMİ ---
    function saveHistory() {
        const currentState = {
            css: previewBox.getAttribute('style'),
            textVal: document.getElementById('fontSize').value,
            // Diğer input değerleri de buraya eklenebilir
        };
        
        // Eğer geri aldıysak ve yeni işlem yaptıysak ilerisini sil
        history = history.slice(0, historyIndex + 1);
        history.push(currentState);
        historyIndex++;
        updateHistoryButtons();
    }

    function undo() {
        if (historyIndex > 0) {
            historyIndex--;
            restoreState(history[historyIndex]);
        }
    }

    function redo() {
        if (historyIndex < history.length - 1) {
            historyIndex++;
            restoreState(history[historyIndex]);
        }
    }

    function restoreState(state) {
        if(!state) return;
        previewBox.setAttribute('style', state.css);
        updateOutput();
        updateHistoryButtons();
    }

    function updateHistoryButtons() {
        document.getElementById('btnUndo').disabled = historyIndex <= 0;
        document.getElementById('btnRedo').disabled = historyIndex >= history.length - 1;
    }

    // --- COPY FUNCTION ---
    function copyCSS() {
        cssOutput.select();
        document.execCommand('copy');
        const btn = document.querySelector('button[onclick="copyCSS()"]');
        const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
        btn.innerHTML = "<i class='fas fa-check'></i> Kopyalandı!";
        setTimeout(() => btn.innerHTML = originalText, 2000);
    }

    // --- UI HELPERS ---
    function toggleFieldset(legend) {
        const content = legend.nextElementSibling;
        const icon = legend.querySelector('i');
        if (content.style.display === "none") {
            content.style.display = "block";
            // icon rotasyonu eklenebilir
        } else {
            content.style.display = "none";
        }
    }
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

## Prompt 10

### You
*2025-12-10 00:06:28 +03*

Sadece js kodunu yaz ekleyeceğim şekilde tam eksizsiz 

### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-10 00:06:29 +03*

Aşağıya sadece `<script>` etiketi içine koyacağın şekilde, eksiksiz JS kodunu veriyorum. Başka hiçbir HTML/CSS yok, direkt kopyalayıp sayfandaki `<script>...</script>` alanına yapıştırabilirsin.

```javascript
// K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 (Ultimate Edition) - FULL JS
console.log('K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 Script Başlatılıyor...');
'use strict';

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    console.log('DOM Yüklendi. K3N4N V8.0 Sistemleri Çevrimiçi...');

    // --- DOM Referansları ---
    const previewBox = document.getElementById('preview-box');
    const cssOutput = document.getElementById('css-output');
    const controlsArea = document.querySelector('.controls');
    const cssInputArea = document.getElementById('cssInputArea');
    const htmlPreviewArea = document.getElementById('htmlPreviewArea');
    const opacityValueSpan = document.getElementById('opacityValue');
    const animationKeyframesInput = document.getElementById('animationKeyframes');
    const undoBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="undo"]');
    const redoBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="redo"]');
    const copyCssBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="copy-css"]');
    const downloadCssBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="download-css"]');
    const downloadHtmlBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="download-html"]');

    // Renk Seçicileri
    const colorPickers = {};
    const colorPickerElements = {
        textColorPicker: { inputId: 'textColor', styleProp: 'color', default: '#ccd6f6', containerId: 'textColorPicker' },
        textShadowColorPicker: { inputId: 'textShadowColor', default: '#000000', containerId: 'textShadowColorPicker' },
        borderColorPicker: { inputId: 'borderColor', styleProp: 'borderColor', default: '#cccccc', containerId: 'borderColorPicker' },
        backgroundColorPicker: { inputId: 'backgroundColor', styleProp: 'backgroundColor', default: '#ffffff', containerId: 'backgroundColorPicker' },
        textStrokeColorPicker: { inputId: 'textStrokeColor', default: '#000000', containerId: 'textStrokeColorPicker' },
        textFillColorPicker: { inputId: 'textFillColor', default: '#ccd6f6', containerId: 'textFillColorPicker' },
    };

    // --- Durum (State) ---
    let currentStyles = {};
    let currentAnimation = { keyframes: null };
    let activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
    let styleHistory = [];
    let historyIndex = -1;
    const MAX_HISTORY = 50;

    // --- Yardımcı Fonksiyonlar (Helpers) ---
    const getRandomInt = (min, max) => Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
    const getRandomFloat = (min, max, precision = 1) =>
        parseFloat((Math.random() * (max - min) + min).toFixed(precision));
    const getRandomFromList = (list) => list[Math.floor(Math.random() * list.length)];
    const getRandomBoolean = (probability = 0.5) => Math.random() < probability;
    const shuffleArray = (array) => {
        for (let i = array.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
            const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
            [array[i], array[j]] = [array[j], array[i]];
        }
        return array;
    };

    // *** Font Boyutu Sınırlandırma Helper'ı (max 20px) ***
    const clampFontSizePx = (value) => {
        if (!value) return '16px';
        let num = 16;
        if (typeof value === 'number') {
            num = value;
        } else if (typeof value === 'string') {
            const m = value.trim().match(/([\d.]+)(px|em|rem|%)?/i);
            if (m) {
                num = parseFloat(m[1]);
                const unit = (m[2] || 'px').toLowerCase();
                if (unit === 'em' || unit === 'rem') num = num * 16;
                if (unit === '%') num = 16 * (num / 100);
            }
        }
        if (num > 20) num = 20;
        if (num < 10) num = 10;
        return `${Math.round(num)}px`;
    };

    // Chroma.js ve Renk Yardımcıları
    const isValidColor = (color) => {
        try { return chroma.valid(color); } catch (e) { return false; }
    };
    const getRandomHex = () => chroma.random().hex();
    const getRandomRgbaString = (minAlpha = 0.3, maxAlpha = 0.9) =>
        chroma.random().alpha(getRandomFloat(minAlpha, maxAlpha, 2)).css();

    const getContrastingColor = (bgColor = '#ffffff', lightTarget = '#FFFFFF', darkTarget = '#112240') => {
        try {
            if (!isValidColor(bgColor)) return darkTarget;
            if (typeof bgColor === 'string' && bgColor.startsWith('var(--')) {
                const computed = getComputedStyle(previewBox)
                    .getPropertyValue(bgColor.slice(4, -1))
                    .trim();
                if (isValidColor(computed)) bgColor = computed;
                else return darkTarget;
            }
            return chroma.contrast(bgColor, lightTarget) >= 4.5 ? lightTarget : darkTarget;
        } catch (e) {
            return darkTarget;
        }
    };

    const generatePalette = (count = 3, type = 'analogous', baseColor = chroma.random()) => {
        if (!isValidColor(baseColor)) baseColor = chroma.random();
        try {
            let scaleColors;
            const options = [
                'analogous',
                'monochromatic',
                'complementary',
                'triadic',
                'split',
                'tetradic',
                'random',
            ];
            type = options.includes(type) ? type : 'random';

            switch (type) {
                case 'analogous':
                    scaleColors = [
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '-30'),
                        baseColor,
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+30'),
                    ];
                    break;
                case 'monochromatic':
                    scaleColors = chroma
                        .scale([baseColor.darken(1.5), baseColor, baseColor.brighten(1.5)])
                        .mode('lch')
                        .colors(count);
                    break;
                case 'complementary':
                    scaleColors = [baseColor, baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+180')];
                    break;
                case 'triadic':
                    scaleColors = [
                        baseColor,
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+120'),
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+240'),
                    ];
                    break;
                case 'split':
                    scaleColors = [
                        baseColor,
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+150'),
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+210'),
                    ];
                    break;
                case 'tetradic':
                    scaleColors = [
                        baseColor,
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+90'),
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+180'),
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+270'),
                    ];
                    break;
                default:
                    scaleColors = Array.from({ length: Math.max(count, 2) }, () => chroma.random());
            }

            if (scaleColors.length > 1 && count > scaleColors.length) {
                return chroma
                    .scale(scaleColors)
                    .mode('lch')
                    .padding(0.1)
                    .correctLightness(true)
                    .colors(count);
            } else if (scaleColors.length > 1) {
                return chroma.scale(scaleColors).mode('lch').colors(count);
            } else {
                return scaleColors;
            }
        } catch (e) {
            return Array.from({ length: count }, () => chroma.random().hex());
        }
    };

    const adjustColor = (color, prop = 'darken', amount = 1) => {
        try {
            return isValidColor(color) ? chroma(color)[prop](amount).hex() : color;
        } catch (e) {
            return color;
        }
    };

    const getRandomAngle = (allowNegative = false) =>
        `${getRandomInt(allowNegative ? -360 : 0, 360)}deg`;
    const getRandomPercent = (min = 0, max = 100) => `${getRandomInt(min, max)}%`;
    const getRandomPixel = (min, max, allowNegative = false) =>
        `${getRandomInt(allowNegative ? min : Math.max(0, min), max)}px`;

    const getRandomLength = (
        min = 0,
        max = 50,
        units = ['px', '%', 'em', 'rem', 'vw'],
        allowNegative = false
    ) => {
        const unit = getRandomFromList(units);
        let val;
        const actualMin = allowNegative ? min : Math.max(0, min);
        if (unit === '%') val = getRandomInt(actualMin, max);
        else if (unit === 'em' || unit === 'rem') val = getRandomFloat(actualMin / 16, max / 16, 2);
        else if (unit === 'vw') val = getRandomInt(actualMin, max);
        else val = getRandomInt(actualMin, max);
        return `${val}${unit}`;
    };

    const getRandomTime = (minMs = 100, maxMs = 3500) => `${getRandomInt(minMs, maxMs)}ms`;
    const getRandomTimingFunction = () =>
        getRandomFromList(['ease', 'linear', 'ease-in', 'ease-out', 'ease-in-out']);
    const getRandomCubicBezier = () =>
        `cubic-bezier(${getRandomFloat(0, 1, 2)}, ${getRandomFloat(
            0,
            1.5,
            2
        )}, ${getRandomFloat(0, 1, 2)}, ${getRandomFloat(0, 1.5, 2)})`;
    const getRandomBlendMode = () =>
        getRandomFromList([
            'normal',
            'multiply',
            'screen',
            'overlay',
            'darken',
            'lighten',
            'color-dodge',
            'color-burn',
            'hard-light',
            'soft-light',
            'difference',
            'exclusion',
            'hue',
            'saturation',
            'color',
            'luminosity',
        ]);

    const getRandomCssVariable = (prefix = '--') => {
        try {
            const styles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
            const vars = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < styles.length; i++) {
                if (styles[i].startsWith(prefix)) vars.push(`var(${styles[i]})`);
            }
            return vars.length > 0 ? getRandomFromList(vars) : null;
        } catch (e) {
            return null;
        }
    };

    const fontList = [
        "'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif",
        "'Poppins', sans-serif",
        "'Roboto', sans-serif",
        'Arial, sans-serif',
        "'Courier New', monospace",
        'Georgia, serif',
        "'Verdana', sans-serif",
        "'Fira Code', monospace",
        "'Comic Sans MS', cursive",
        "'Impact', sans-serif",
        "'Press Start 2P', cursive",
        "'Orbitron', sans-serif",
        "'Raleway', sans-serif',
        "'Oswald', sans-serif",
        "'Lora', serif",
        "'Merriweather', serif",
    ];
    const cursorList = [
        'auto',
        'default',
        'pointer',
        'wait',
        'text',
        'move',
        'grab',
        'grabbing',
        'zoom-in',
        'zoom-out',
        'not-allowed',
    ];
    const userSelectList = ['auto', 'text', 'none', 'all'];
    const animationDirectionList = ['normal', 'reverse', 'alternate', 'alternate-reverse'];
    const animationFillModeList = ['none', 'forwards', 'backwards', 'both'];
    const simpleAnimationNames = [
        'K3N4N-Pulse',
        'K3N4N-Spin',
        'K3N4N-FadeInOut',
        'K3N4N-Shake',
        'K3N4N-Bounce',
        'K3N4N-Glitch',
        'K3N4N-Float',
    ];

    function debounce(func, wait) {
        let timeout;
        return function (...args) {
            clearTimeout(timeout);
            timeout = setTimeout(() => func.apply(this, args), wait);
        };
    }
    const debouncedUpdateAndSave = debounce(() => {
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    }, 300);

    // --- Renk Seçicileri (iro.js) Başlat ---
    const initColorPickers = () => {
        Object.entries(colorPickerElements).forEach(([key, cfg]) => {
            const container = document.getElementById(cfg.containerId);
            const input = document.getElementById(cfg.inputId);
            if (!container || !input) return;
            const picker = new iro.ColorPicker(container, {
                width: 160,
                color: input.value || cfg.default,
                layout: [
                    { component: iro.ui.Box },
                    { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'hue' } },
                    { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'alpha' } },
                ],
            });
            colorPickers[key] = { instance: picker, input };

            picker.on('color:change', (color) => {
                input.value = color.hex8String;
                if (cfg.styleProp) {
                    currentStyles[cfg.styleProp] = color.hex8String;
                    debouncedUpdateAndSave();
                } else {
                    // Özel alanlar (gölge, stroke vs)
                    if (cfg.inputId === 'textShadowColor') debouncedSetTextShadow();
                    else if (cfg.inputId === 'textStrokeColor') debouncedSetTextStroke();
                    else if (cfg.inputId === 'textFillColor') {
                        currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor = color.hex8String;
                        updatePreviewAndOutput();
                        saveHistory();
                    }
                }
            });
        });
    };

    // --- Text Shadow, Stroke, Animation Keyframes gibi karmaşık alanlar ---
    const setTextShadowFromInputs = () => {
        const x = document.getElementById('textShadowX').value || 0;
        const y = document.getElementById('textShadowY').value || 0;
        const blur = document.getElementById('textShadowBlur').value || 0;
        const color =
            colorPickers.textShadowColorPicker?.instance.rgbaString || 'rgba(0,0,0,0)';
        let shadowValue = '';
        if (x != 0 || y != 0 || blur != 0) {
            shadowValue = `${x}px ${y}px ${blur}px ${color}`;
        }

        const manualInput = document.getElementById('textShadowManual');
        if (!shadowValue && manualInput.value.trim()) currentStyles.textShadow = manualInput.value.trim();
        else {
            if (shadowValue) currentStyles.textShadow = shadowValue;
            else delete currentStyles.textShadow;
            manualInput.value = currentStyles.textShadow || '';
        }
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    };
    const debouncedSetTextShadow = debounce(setTextShadowFromInputs, 250);

    const setTextStrokeFromInputs = () => {
        const width = document.getElementById('textStrokeWidth').value || 0;
        const color =
            colorPickers.textStrokeColorPicker?.instance.hexString || '#000000';
        if (width > 0) {
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth = `${width}px`;
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor = color;
            currentStyles.textStrokeWidth = `${width}px`;
            currentStyles.textStrokeColor = color;
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'stroke';
            if (
                !currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor ||
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor !== 'transparent'
            ) {
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor =
                    currentStyles.color || colorPickerElements.textColorPicker.default;
            }
        } else {
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth;
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeWidth;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeColor;
            if (activeWebkitTextEffect === 'stroke') activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        }
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    };
    const debouncedSetTextStroke = debounce(setTextStrokeFromInputs, 250);

    const clearTextClipEffect = (clearBackground = true) => {
        delete currentStyles.webkitBackgroundClip;
        delete currentStyles.backgroundClip;
        delete currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor;
        delete currentStyles.textFillColor;
        if (clearBackground) {
            delete currentStyles.backgroundImage;
            delete currentStyles.background;
        }
        if (currentStyles.color === 'transparent') {
            currentStyles.color =
                colorPickers.textColorPicker?.instance.hexString ||
                colorPickerElements.textColorPicker.default;
        }
        if (activeWebkitTextEffect === 'image' || activeWebkitTextEffect === 'gradient') {
            activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        }
    };

    const setBackgroundForTextClip = (type, value) => {
        clearTextClipEffect(false);
        if (type === 'image' && value) {
            currentStyles.backgroundImage = `url('${value}')`;
            currentStyles.backgroundSize =
                document.getElementById('textBackgroundSize').value || 'cover';
            currentStyles.backgroundRepeat =
                document.getElementById('textBackgroundRepeat').value || 'no-repeat';
            currentStyles.backgroundPosition =
                document.getElementById('textBackgroundPosition').value || 'center';
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'image';
        } else if (type === 'gradient' && value) {
            currentStyles.background = value;
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'gradient';
        } else return;

        currentStyles.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
        currentStyles.backgroundClip = 'text';
        currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
        currentStyles.textFillColor = 'transparent';
        currentStyles.color = 'transparent';
        delete currentStyles.backgroundColor;
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    };

    const handleAnimationKeyframesChange = () => {
        const keyframesValue = animationKeyframesInput.value.trim();
        if (keyframesValue && keyframesValue.includes('@keyframes'))
            currentAnimation.keyframes = keyframesValue;
        else currentAnimation.keyframes = null;
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
    };
    const debouncedHandleAnimationKeyframesChange = debounce(
        handleAnimationKeyframesChange,
        400
    );

    // --- Rastgele Stil Fonksiyonları (Temel) ---

    const applyRandomFont = () => {
        currentStyles.fontFamily = getRandomFromList(fontList);
        currentStyles.fontSize = clampFontSizePx(getRandomInt(12, 20));
        currentStyles.fontWeight = getRandomFromList([
            '100',
            '300',
            '400',
            '600',
            '700',
            '900',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomColor = () => {
        const paletteType = getRandomFromList([
            'analogous',
            'monochromatic',
            'complementary',
            'triadic',
            'random',
        ]);
        const palette = generatePalette(5, paletteType);
        currentStyles.color = palette[0];

        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) {
            const shadowColor = chroma(palette[1]).alpha(0.6).css();
            currentStyles.textShadow = `2px 2px 4px ${shadowColor}`;
        } else {
            delete currentStyles.textShadow;
        }
    };

    const applyRandomTextShadow = () => {
        const offsetX = getRandomInt(-3, 6);
        const offsetY = getRandomInt(-3, 6);
        const blur = getRandomInt(0, 8);
        const color = getRandomRgbaString(0.4, 0.9);
        currentStyles.textShadow = `${offsetX}px ${offsetY}px ${blur}px ${color}`;
    };

    const applyRandomTextDecoration = () => {
        const line = getRandomFromList(['none', 'underline', 'overline', 'line-through']);
        const style = getRandomFromList([
            'solid',
            'double',
            'dotted',
            'dashed',
            'wavy',
        ]);
        const thickness = getRandomInt(1, 4);
        const color = getRandomHex();
        currentStyles.textDecorationLine = line;
        currentStyles.textDecorationStyle = style;
        currentStyles.textDecorationThickness = `${thickness}px`;
        currentStyles.textDecorationColor = color;
    };

    const applyRandomSpacing = () => {
        currentStyles.letterSpacing = `${getRandomFloat(-1, 5, 1)}px`;
        currentStyles.wordSpacing = `${getRandomInt(0, 15)}px`;
        currentStyles.lineHeight = getRandomFloat(1, 2.5, 2);
    };

    const applyRandomTextTransform = () => {
        currentStyles.textTransform = getRandomFromList([
            'none',
            'uppercase',
            'lowercase',
            'capitalize',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomTextAlign = () => {
        currentStyles.textAlign = getRandomFromList([
            'left',
            'center',
            'right',
            'justify',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomBgColor = () => {
        currentStyles.backgroundColor = getRandomRgbaString(0.8, 1);
        delete currentStyles.backgroundImage;
        delete currentStyles.background;
        if (activeWebkitTextEffect) clearTextClipEffect(false);
    };

    const applyRandomGradient = () => {
        const type = getRandomFromList(['linear', 'radial', 'conic']);
        const palette = generatePalette(3, 'random');
        const stops = palette.map((c, i) => `${c} ${i * 50}%`).join(', ');
        if (type === 'linear')
            currentStyles.background = `linear-gradient(${getRandomAngle(
                true
            )}, ${stops})`;
        else if (type === 'radial')
            currentStyles.background = `radial-gradient(circle, ${stops})`;
        else currentStyles.background = `conic-gradient(from ${getRandomAngle(true)}, ${stops})`;
        delete currentStyles.backgroundColor;
        delete currentStyles.backgroundImage;
    };

    const applyRandomBgImage = () => {
        const categories = [
            'nature',
            'abstract',
            'city',
            'tech',
            'space',
            'colors',
            'pattern',
        ];
        const cat = getRandomFromList(categories);
        const url = `https://source.unsplash.com/random/800x600/?${encodeURIComponent(cat)}`;
        currentStyles.backgroundImage = `url('${url}')`;
        currentStyles.backgroundSize = getRandomFromList([
            'cover',
            'contain',
            '100% 100%',
        ]);
        currentStyles.backgroundRepeat = getRandomFromList([
            'no-repeat',
            'repeat',
            'repeat-x',
            'repeat-y',
        ]);
        currentStyles.backgroundPosition = getRandomFromList([
            'center',
            'top',
            'bottom',
            'left',
            'right',
            'top left',
            'top right',
            'bottom left',
            'bottom right',
        ]);
        if (!currentStyles.backgroundColor)
            currentStyles.backgroundColor = getRandomRgbaString(0.6, 1);
    };

    const applyRandomBgProps = () => {
        if (currentStyles.backgroundImage) {
            currentStyles.backgroundSize = getRandomFromList([
                'auto',
                'cover',
                'contain',
                '100% 100%',
                '50%',
            ]);
            currentStyles.backgroundRepeat = getRandomFromList([
                'repeat',
                'no-repeat',
                'repeat-x',
                'repeat-y',
                'round',
                'space',
            ]);
            currentStyles.backgroundPosition = `${getRandomPercent()} ${getRandomPercent()}`;
        }
    };

    const applyRandomBgBlendMode = () => {
        currentStyles.backgroundBlendMode = getRandomBlendMode();
    };

    const applyRandomBorder = () => {
        currentStyles.borderWidth = `${getRandomInt(0, 10)}px`;
        currentStyles.borderStyle = getRandomFromList([
            'none',
            'solid',
            'dashed',
            'dotted',
            'double',
            'groove',
            'ridge',
            'inset',
            'outset',
        ]);
        currentStyles.borderColor = getRandomRgbaString(0.5, 1);
        currentStyles.borderRadius = getRandomFromList([
            '0',
            '5px',
            '10px',
            '50%',
            '20px',
            '10px 30px',
            '30px 10px 30px 10px',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomSizePaddingMargin = () => {
        currentStyles.width = getRandomFromList([
            'auto',
            `${getRandomInt(150, 400)}px`,
            `${getRandomInt(30, 90)}%`,
        ]);
        currentStyles.height = getRandomFromList([
            'auto',
            `${getRandomInt(100, 300)}px`,
        ]);
        currentStyles.padding = `${getRandomInt(5, 30)}px ${getRandomInt(5, 40)}px`;
        currentStyles.margin = getRandomFromList([
            '0 auto',
            `${getRandomInt(5, 30)}px auto`,
            `${getRandomInt(0, 20)}px`,
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomDisplayPosition = () => {
        currentStyles.display = getRandomFromList([
            'block',
            'inline-block',
            'flex',
            'grid',
        ]);
        currentStyles.position = getRandomFromList([
            'static',
            'relative',
            'absolute',
            'fixed',
            'sticky',
        ]);
        if (currentStyles.position !== 'static') {
            currentStyles.top = getRandomFromList(['auto', getRandomPixel(-20, 50, true)]);
            currentStyles.left = getRandomFromList(['auto', getRandomPixel(-20, 50, true)]);
        } else {
            delete currentStyles.top;
            delete currentStyles.left;
        }
    };

    const applyRandomBoxShadow = () => {
        const inset = getRandomBoolean(0.2) ? 'inset ' : '';
        const x = getRandomPixel(-10, 15, true);
        const y = getRandomPixel(-10, 15, true);
        const blur = getRandomPixel(0, 25);
        const spread = getRandomPixel(-5, 10, true);
        const color = getRandomRgbaString(0.3, 0.9);
        currentStyles.boxShadow = `${inset}${x} ${y} ${blur} ${spread} ${color}`;
    };

    const applyRandomOpacity = () => {
        const val = getRandomFloat(0.3, 1, 2);
        currentStyles.opacity = val;
        if (opacityValueSpan) opacityValueSpan.textContent = val;
    };

    const applyRandomFilter = () => {
        const filters = [];
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) filters.push(`blur(${getRandomInt(0, 5)}px)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) filters.push(`brightness(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.5, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4)) filters.push(`contrast(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.5, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3))
            filters.push(`saturate(${getRandomFloat(0.5, 2, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3)) filters.push(`hue-rotate(${getRandomInt(0, 360)}deg)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.2))
            filters.push(`drop-shadow(${getRandomPixel(-5, 5, true)} ${getRandomPixel(
                -5,
                5,
                true
            )} ${getRandomPixel(0, 10)} ${getRandomRgbaString(0.3, 0.8)})`);
        currentStyles.filter = filters.join(' ');
    };

    const applyRandomTransform = () => {
        const transforms = [];
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7))
            transforms.push(`rotate(${getRandomInt(-30, 30)}deg)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7))
            transforms.push(
                `scale(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.4, 2)}, ${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.4, 2)})`
            );
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5))
            transforms.push(`skew(${getRandomInt(-15, 15)}deg, ${getRandomInt(
                -15,
                15
            )}deg)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4))
            transforms.push(`translate(${getRandomPixel(-30, 30, true)}, ${getRandomPixel(
                -20,
                20,
                true
            )})`);
        currentStyles.transform = transforms.join(' ');
        currentStyles.transformOrigin = getRandomFromList([
            'center',
            'top',
            'bottom',
            'left',
            'right',
            'top left',
            'top right',
            'bottom left',
            'bottom right',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomCursor = () => {
        currentStyles.cursor = getRandomFromList(cursorList);
    };

    const applyRandomUserSelect = () => {
        currentStyles.userSelect = getRandomFromList(userSelectList);
    };

    const applyRandomTextStroke = () => {
        const width = getRandomInt(0, 4);
        if (width === 0) {
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth;
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeWidth;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeColor;
            if (activeWebkitTextEffect === 'stroke') activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        } else {
            const color = getRandomHex();
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth = `${width}px`;
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor = color;
            currentStyles.textStrokeWidth = `${width}px`;
            currentStyles.textStrokeColor = color;
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'stroke';
            if (
                !currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor ||
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor === 'transparent'
            ) {
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor =
                    currentStyles.color || colorPickerElements.textColorPicker.default;
            }
        }
    };

    const applyRandomTextGradient = () => {
        const palette = generatePalette(3, 'random');
        const angle = getRandomAngle();
        const gradient = `linear-gradient(${angle}, ${palette.join(', ')})`;
        setBackgroundForTextClip('gradient', gradient);
    };

    const applyRandomTextImage = () => {
        const categories = ['texture', 'pattern', 'metal', 'fire', 'water', 'sky'];
        const cat = getRandomFromList(categories);
        const url = `https://source.unsplash.com/random/800x600/?${encodeURIComponent(cat)}`;
        setBackgroundForTextClip('image', url);
        document.getElementById('textBackgroundImageUrl').value = url;
    };

    const applyRandomAnimation = () => {
        const name = getRandomFromList(simpleAnimationNames);
        currentStyles.animationName = name;
        currentStyles.animationDuration = getRandomTime(500, 3000);
        currentStyles.animationTimingFunction = getRandomFromList([
            getRandomTimingFunction(),
            getRandomCubicBezier(),
        ]);
        currentStyles.animationDelay = getRandomTime(0, 1000);
        currentStyles.animationIterationCount = getRandomFromList([
            'infinite',
            '1',
            '2',
            '3',
            '5',
        ]);
        currentStyles.animationDirection = getRandomFromList(animationDirectionList);
        currentStyles.animationFillMode = getRandomFromList(animationFillModeList);

        switch (name) {
            case 'K3N4N-Pulse':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Pulse {
  0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 1; }
  100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Spin':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Spin {
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-FadeInOut':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-FadeInOut {
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  50% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Shake':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Shake {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
  20%, 60% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
  40%, 80% { transform: translateX(5px); }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Bounce':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Bounce {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-15px); }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Glitch':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Glitch {
  0% { transform: translate(0); }
  20% { transform: translate(-2px, 2px); }
  40% { transform: translate(-2px, -2px); }
  60% { transform: translate(2px, 2px); }
  80% { transform: translate(2px, -2px); }
  100% { transform: translate(0); }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Float':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Float {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
}`;
                break;
            default:
                currentAnimation.keyframes = null;
        }
    };

    // --- Preset Butonları ---

    const applyTextShadowPreset = (preset) => {
        switch (preset) {
            case 'light':
                currentStyles.textShadow = '1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
                break;
            case 'medium':
                currentStyles.textShadow = '2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
                break;
            case 'neon':
                currentStyles.textShadow = `0 0 5px #fff, 0 0 10px ${getRandomHex()}, 0 0 20px ${getRandomHex()}`;
                break;
            case 'soft':
                currentStyles.textShadow = '0 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
                break;
            case 'double':
                currentStyles.textShadow = '1px 1px 0 #000, -1px -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5)';
                break;
            default:
                return;
        }
    };

    const applyBoxShadowPreset = (preset) => {
        switch (preset) {
            case 'light':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
                break;
            case 'medium':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)';
                break;
            case 'heavy':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)';
                break;
            case 'inset':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = 'inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
                break;
            case 'colored':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = `0 0 10px ${getRandomHex()}, 0 0 20px ${getRandomHex()}`;
                break;
            case 'neumorphism-light':
                currentStyles.boxShadow =
                    '9px 9px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.25), -9px -9px 16px rgba(255,255,255,0.7)';
                currentStyles.backgroundColor = '#e0e0e0';
                currentStyles.borderRadius = '20px';
                break;
            case 'neumorphism-dark':
                currentStyles.boxShadow =
                    '9px 9px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.85), -9px -9px 16px rgba(50,50,50,0.5)';
                currentStyles.backgroundColor = '#2b2b2b';
                currentStyles.borderRadius = '20px';
                currentStyles.color = '#f5f5f5';
                break;
            default:
                return;
        }
    };

    // --- Otomatik Akıllı Setler (V4.5) ---

    const applyAutoGeneric = () => {
        if (!currentStyles.backgroundColor && !currentStyles.background) {
            applyRandomBgColor();
        }
        if (!currentStyles.color) {
            currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(
                currentStyles.backgroundColor || '#ffffff'
            );
        }
        if (!currentStyles.fontFamily || !currentStyles.fontSize) {
            applyRandomFont();
        }
        if (!currentStyles.padding) currentStyles.padding = '20px';
        if (!currentStyles.borderRadius) currentStyles.borderRadius = '8px';
        if (!currentStyles.boxShadow) applyBoxShadowPreset('medium');
    };

    const applyAutoContrastText = () => {
        const bg =
            currentStyles.backgroundColor ||
            (currentStyles.background && getRandomHex()) ||
            '#ffffff';
        currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(bg);
    };

    const applyAutoShadow = () => {
        const bg =
            currentStyles.backgroundColor ||
            (currentStyles.background && getRandomHex()) ||
            '#ffffff';
        const darker = adjustColor(bg, 'darken', 1.2);
        currentStyles.boxShadow = `0 8px 18px ${chroma(darker).alpha(0.7).css()}`;
    };

    const applyAutoGradient = () => {
        const base =
            currentStyles.backgroundColor ||
            (currentStyles.background && getRandomHex()) ||
            '#3498db';
        const palette = generatePalette(3, 'analogous', base);
        currentStyles.background = `linear-gradient(135deg, ${palette.join(', ')})`;
        delete currentStyles.backgroundColor;

        if (!currentStyles.color) {
            currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(palette[1]);
        }
    };

    const applyAutoTheme = () => {
        const varColor = getRandomCssVariable('--accent-color') || 'var(--accent-color)';
        currentStyles.border = `1px solid ${varColor}`;
        currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)';
        currentStyles.borderRadius = '10px';
        currentStyles.padding = currentStyles.padding || '18px 24px';
        currentStyles.fontFamily = currentStyles.fontFamily || "'Poppins', sans-serif";
        currentStyles.fontSize = currentStyles.fontSize || '18px';
        currentStyles.color = currentStyles.color || 'var(--text-primary)';
        currentStyles.backgroundColor =
            currentStyles.backgroundColor || 'var(--bg-light)';
    };

    // --- Yüksek Seviye Komple Setler (Text, BG, Shape, Effect, WebkitText, Animation) ---

    const applyRandomTextSet = () => {
        applyRandomFont();
        applyRandomColor();
        applyRandomSpacing();
        applyRandomTextTransform();
        applyRandomTextAlign();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomTextShadow();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4)) applyRandomTextDecoration();
    };

    const applyRandomBgSet = () => {
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomBgColor();
        else applyRandomGradient();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomBgImage();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) applyRandomBgProps();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3)) applyRandomBgBlendMode();
    };

    const applyRandomShapeSet = () => {
        applyRandomSizePaddingMargin();
        applyRandomBorder();
        applyRandomDisplayPosition();
    };

    const applyRandomEffectSet = () => {
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomBoxShadow();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomOpacity();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomFilter();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomTransform();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) applyRandomCursor();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomUserSelect();
    };

    const applyRandomWebkitTextSet = () => {
        applyRandomTextStroke();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomTextGradient();
        else applyRandomTextImage();
    };

    const applyRandomAnimationSet = () => {
        applyRandomAnimation();
    };

    const applyRandomMix = () => {
        applyRandomTextSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomBgSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomShapeSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.9)) applyRandomEffectSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomWebkitTextSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomAnimationSet();
    };

    const applyMaxChaos = () => {
        resetAllStyles(false);
        const actions = [
            applyRandomTextSet,
            applyRandomBgSet,
            applyRandomShapeSet,
            applyRandomEffectSet,
            applyRandomWebkitTextSet,
            applyRandomAnimationSet,
        ];
        shuffleArray(actions);
        actions.forEach((fn) => fn());
    };

    // --- Reset / History ---

    const resetAllStyles = (clearHistory = true) => {
        currentStyles = {};
        currentAnimation = { keyframes: null };
        activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        previewBox.removeAttribute('style');
        if (clearHistory) {
            styleHistory = [];
            historyIndex = -1;
            updateHistoryButtons();
        }
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
    };

    const saveHistory = () => {
        const snapshot = JSON.stringify({ styles: currentStyles, animation: currentAnimation });
        if (
            historyIndex >= 0 &&
            historyIndex < styleHistory.length &&
            styleHistory[historyIndex] === snapshot
        ) {
            return;
        }
        styleHistory = styleHistory.slice(0, historyIndex + 1);
        styleHistory.push(snapshot);
        if (styleHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) {
            styleHistory.shift();
        } else {
            historyIndex++;
        }
        updateHistoryButtons();
    };

    const loadHistory = (index) => {
        if (index < 0 || index >= styleHistory.length) return;
        const snapshot = JSON.parse(styleHistory[index]);
        currentStyles = snapshot.styles || {};
        currentAnimation = snapshot.animation || { keyframes: null };
        historyIndex = index;
        updateHistoryButtons();
        updatePreviewAndOutput(false);
    };

    const undo = () => {
        if (historyIndex > 0) loadHistory(historyIndex - 1);
    };

    const redo = () => {
        if (historyIndex < styleHistory.length - 1) loadHistory(historyIndex + 1);
    };

    const updateHistoryButtons = () => {
        if (undoBtn) undoBtn.disabled = historyIndex <= 0;
        if (redoBtn) redoBtn.disabled = historyIndex >= styleHistory.length - 1;
    };

    // --- CSS Oluşturma / Önizleme ---

    const generateCssString = () => {
        const lines = [];
        const specialLines = {};
        Object.entries(currentStyles).forEach(([prop, value]) => {
            if (value == null || value === '') return;
            if (prop.startsWith('#') || prop.startsWith('@') || prop.includes(':')) {
                specialLines[prop] = value;
                return;
            }
            const cssProp = prop.replace(/[A-Z]/g, (m) => '-' + m.toLowerCase());
            lines.push(`  ${cssProp}: ${value};`);
        });
        let css = `#preview-box {\n${lines.join('\n')}\n}`;
        if (currentAnimation.keyframes) {
            css += `\n\n${currentAnimation.keyframes}`;
        }
        return css;
    };

    const updatePreviewAndOutput = (save = true) => {
        const styleString = generateCssString();
        cssOutput.value = styleString;

        const transform = currentStyles.transform;
        const animation = currentStyles.animation;
        const filter = currentStyles.filter;

        previewBox.removeAttribute('style');
        Object.entries(currentStyles).forEach(([prop, value]) => {
            if (prop.startsWith('#') || prop.startsWith('@') || prop.includes(':')) return;
            try {
                previewBox.style[prop] = value;
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn('Stil uygulanamadı:', prop, value, e);
            }
        });

        // manual "is-empty" class
        if (!previewBox.textContent.trim()) {
            previewBox.classList.add('is-empty');
        } else {
            previewBox.classList.remove('is-empty');
        }

        copyCssBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();
        downloadCssBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();
        downloadHtmlBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();

        if (save) saveHistory();
    };

    // --- CSS Kopyalama / İndirme ---

    const copyCssToClipboard = () => {
        const val = cssOutput.value.trim();
        if (!val) return;
        navigator.clipboard
            .writeText(val)
            .then(() => {
                copyCssBtn.classList.add('copied');
                copyCssBtn.innerHTML =
                    '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Kopyalandı!';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyCssBtn.classList.remove('copied');
                    copyCssBtn.innerHTML =
                        '<i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Kodu Kopyala';
                }, 1500);
            })
            .catch((err) => {
                console.error('Kopyalama hatası:', err);
                alert('Kopyalama başarısız oldu. Tarayıcı izinlerini kontrol edin.');
            });
    };

    const downloadFile = (filename, content, type = 'text/plain') => {
        const blob = new Blob([content], { type });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = filename;
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        a.remove();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    };

    const downloadCss = () => {
        const val = cssOutput.value.trim();
        if (!val) return;
        downloadFile('k3n4n-style.css', val, 'text/css');
    };

    const downloadHtml = () => {
        const css = cssOutput.value.trim();
        if (!css) return;
        const html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>K3N4N Önizleme</title>
<style>
${css}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="preview-box">K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 Önizleme</div>
</body>
</html>`;
        downloadFile('k3n4n-preview.html', html, 'text/html');
    };

    // --- CSS Yapıştır / Önizleme ---

    const parseSimpleCssBlock = (cssText) => {
        const result = {};
        const lines = cssText
            .split('\n')
            .map((l) => l.trim())
            .filter(Boolean);
        lines.forEach((line) => {
            if (line.startsWith('@keyframes')) {
                // keyframes'i direkt bırak
                return;
            }
            const m = line.match(/^([a-zA-Z-]+)\s*:\s*(.+);$/);
            if (!m) return;
            const prop = m[1].trim();
            const val = m[2].trim();
            const camel = prop.replace(/-([a-z])/g, (g) => g[1].toUpperCase());
            result[camel] = val;
        });
        return result;
    };

    const previewPastedCss = () => {
        const css = cssInputArea.value.trim();
        htmlPreviewArea.innerHTML = '';
        if (!css) {
            htmlPreviewArea.innerHTML =
                '<span class="preview-error">Önizlenecek CSS yok.</span>';
            return;
        }

        const simpleBlockMatch = css.match(/{([\s\S]*?)}/);
        const keyframesMatch = css.match(/@keyframes[\s\S]+?}/);
        const simpleBlock = simpleBlockMatch ? simpleBlockMatch[1] : css;
        const parsed = parseSimpleCssBlock(simpleBlock);
        const previewDiv = document.createElement('div');
        previewDiv.className = 'preview-wrapper';
        const inner = document.createElement('div');
        inner.className = 'preview-element';
        inner.textContent = 'Yapıştırılan CSS Önizleme';
        Object.entries(parsed).forEach(([prop, val]) => {
            try {
                inner.style[prop] = val;
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn('Önizleme stil hatası:', prop, val);
            }
        });
        previewDiv.appendChild(inner);
        if (keyframesMatch) {
            const info = document.createElement('div');
            info.style.marginTop = '8px';
            info.style.fontSize = '0.85em';
            info.style.opacity = '0.75';
            info.textContent = '@keyframes kuralları algılandı ve ana CSS çıktısına eklenebilir.';
            previewDiv.appendChild(info);
        }

        htmlPreviewArea.appendChild(previewDiv);
    };

    const addPastedCssToMain = () => {
        const css = cssInputArea.value.trim();
        if (!css) return;
        const simpleBlockMatch = css.match(/{([\s\S]*?)}/);
        const keyframesMatch = css.match(/@keyframes[\s\S]+?}/);
        const simpleBlock = simpleBlockMatch ? simpleBlockMatch[1] : css;
        const parsed = parseSimpleCssBlock(simpleBlock);
        Object.assign(currentStyles, parsed);
        if (keyframesMatch) {
            currentAnimation.keyframes = keyframesMatch[0];
            animationKeyframesInput.value = currentAnimation.keyframes;
        }
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    };

    // --- Event Listener Kurulum ---

    const initFieldsetToggles = () => {
        const fieldsets = document.querySelectorAll('.controls fieldset');
        fieldsets.forEach((fs) => {
            const legend = fs.querySelector('legend');
            if (!legend) return;
            legend.addEventListener('click', () => {
                fs.classList.toggle('expanded');
            });
        });
    };

    const initInputsBinding = () => {
        const allInputs = controlsArea.querySelectorAll(
            'input[data-style-prop], select[data-style-prop], textarea[data-style-prop]'
        );
        allInputs.forEach((el) => {
            const prop = el.getAttribute('data-style-prop');
            const unit = el.getAttribute('data-style-unit') || '';
            const handler = () => {
                let value = el.value;
                if (unit && value !== '' && !String(value).endsWith(unit)) {
                    value = `${value}${unit}`;
                }
                if (value === '') delete currentStyles[prop];
                else currentStyles[prop] = value;
                if (prop === 'opacity' && opacityValueSpan) {
                    opacityValueSpan.textContent = value;
                }
                debouncedUpdateAndSave();
            };
            el.addEventListener('input', handler);
            el.addEventListener('change', handler);
        });

        const opacityEl = document.getElementById('opacity');
        if (opacityEl && opacityValueSpan) {
            opacityValueSpan.textContent = opacityEl.value;
        }

        const txtShadowInputs = ['textShadowX', 'textShadowY', 'textShadowBlur'];
        txtShadowInputs.forEach((id) => {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (!el) return;
            el.addEventListener('input', debouncedSetTextShadow);
            el.addEventListener('change', debouncedSetTextShadow);
        });

        const textShadowManual = document.getElementById('textShadowManual');
        if (textShadowManual) {
            textShadowManual.addEventListener('input', () => {
                const value = textShadowManual.value.trim();
                if (value) currentStyles.textShadow = value;
                else delete currentStyles.textShadow;
                debouncedUpdateAndSave();
            });
        }

        const textStrokeWidthEl = document.getElementById('textStrokeWidth');
        if (textStrokeWidthEl) {
            textStrokeWidthEl.addEventListener('input', debouncedSetTextStroke);
            textStrokeWidthEl.addEventListener('change', debouncedSetTextStroke);
        }

        const bgImageUrlInput = document.getElementById('backgroundImageUrl');
        if (bgImageUrlInput) {
            const handler = () => {
                const url = bgImageUrlInput.value.trim();
                if (url) currentStyles.backgroundImage = `url('${url}')`;
                else delete currentStyles.backgroundImage;
                debouncedUpdateAndSave();
            };
            bgImageUrlInput.addEventListener('change', handler);
            bgImageUrlInput.addEventListener('blur', handler);
        }

        const textBgImageUrlInput = document.getElementById('textBackgroundImageUrl');
        if (textBgImageUrlInput) {
            const handler = () => {
                const url = textBgImageUrlInput.value.trim();
                if (url) setBackgroundForTextClip('image', url);
                else clearTextClipEffect(true);
            };
            textBgImageUrlInput.addEventListener('change', handler);
            textBgImageUrlInput.addEventListener('blur', handler);
        }

        if (animationKeyframesInput) {
            animationKeyframesInput.addEventListener('input', debouncedHandleAnimationKeyframesChange);
        }
    };

    const initButtons = () => {
        controlsArea.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const btn = e.target.closest('button');
            if (!btn) return;
            const styleTarget = btn.getAttribute('data-style-target');
            const presetTarget = btn.getAttribute('data-preset-target');
            const presetValue = btn.getAttribute('data-preset-value');
            const action = btn.getAttribute('data-action');

            if (styleTarget) {
                e.preventDefault();
                switch (styleTarget) {
                    case 'random-font':
                        applyRandomFont();
                        break;
                    case 'random-color':
                        applyRandomColor();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-shadow':
                        applyRandomTextShadow();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-decoration':
                        applyRandomTextDecoration();
                        break;
                    case 'random-spacing':
                        applyRandomSpacing();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-transform':
                        applyRandomTextTransform();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-align':
                        applyRandomTextAlign();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-color':
                        applyRandomBgColor();
                        break;
                    case 'random-gradient':
                        applyRandomGradient();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-image':
                        applyRandomBgImage();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-props':
                        applyRandomBgProps();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-blend-mode':
                        applyRandomBgBlendMode();
                        break;
                    case 'random-border':
                        applyRandomBorder();
                        break;
                    case 'random-size-padding-margin':
                        applyRandomSizePaddingMargin();
                        break;
                    case 'random-display-position':
                        applyRandomDisplayPosition();
                        break;
                    case 'random-box-shadow':
                        applyRandomBoxShadow();
                        break;
                    case 'random-opacity':
                        applyRandomOpacity();
                        break;
                    case 'random-filter':
                        applyRandomFilter();
                        break;
                    case 'random-transform':
                        applyRandomTransform();
                        break;
                    case 'random-cursor':
                        applyRandomCursor();
```
