### GPT-5.1
*2025-12-10 02:16:52 +03*

Aşağıya, senin HTML’inde `<script>` etiketinin içinde kalan kısmın **tamamını, sıfırdan, temiz ve eksiksiz** olarak veriyorum.  
Mevcut HTML yapına %100 uyumlu, yukarıda verdiğin “PART 1” içindeki tekrar/bozuk kısımları tamamen sadeleştirip tek blok haline getirdim.

Sadece aşağıdaki JS’i alıp, sayfandaki mevcut `<script>...</script>` içeriğini bununla değiştirmen yeterli.

```javascript
// K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 (Ultimate Edition) - FULL SCRIPT (CLEAN)
console.log('K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 Script Başlatılıyor...');
'use strict';

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    console.log('DOM Yüklendi. K3N4N V8.0 Sistemleri Çevrimiçi...');

    // --- DOM Referansları ---
    const previewBox = document.getElementById('preview-box');
    const cssOutput = document.getElementById('css-output');
    const controlsArea = document.querySelector('.controls');
    const cssInputArea = document.getElementById('cssInputArea');
    const htmlPreviewArea = document.getElementById('htmlPreviewArea');
    const opacityValueSpan = document.getElementById('opacityValue');
    const animationKeyframesInput = document.getElementById('animationKeyframes');
    const undoBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="undo"]');
    const redoBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="redo"]');
    const copyCssBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="copy-css"]');
    const downloadCssBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="download-css"]');
    const downloadHtmlBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="download-html"]');

    // Renk Seçicileri
    const colorPickers = {};
    const colorPickerElements = {
        textColorPicker: { inputId: 'textColor', styleProp: 'color', default: '#ccd6f6' },
        textShadowColorPicker: { inputId: 'textShadowColor', default: '#000000' },
        borderColorPicker: { inputId: 'borderColor', styleProp: 'borderColor', default: '#cccccc' },
        backgroundColorPicker: { inputId: 'backgroundColor', styleProp: 'backgroundColor', default: '#ffffff' },
        textStrokeColorPicker: { inputId: 'textStrokeColor', default: '#000000' },
        textFillColorPicker: { inputId: 'textFillColor', default: '#ccd6f6' },
    };

    // --- Durum (State) ---
    let currentStyles = {};
    let currentAnimation = { keyframes: null };
    let activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
    let styleHistory = [];
    let historyIndex = -1;
    const MAX_HISTORY = 50;

    // --- Helpers ---
    const getRandomInt = (min, max) =>
        Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;

    const getRandomFloat = (min, max, precision = 1) =>
        parseFloat((Math.random() * (max - min) + min).toFixed(precision));

    const getRandomFromList = (list) =>
        list[Math.floor(Math.random() * list.length)];

    const getRandomBoolean = (probability = 0.5) =>
        Math.random() < probability;

    const shuffleArray = (array) => {
        for (let i = array.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
            const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
            [array[i], array[j]] = [array[j], array[i]];
        }
        return array;
    };

    // Font boyutu sınırlandırma (10px–20px)
    const clampFontSizePx = (value) => {
        if (!value) return '16px';
        let num = 16;
        if (typeof value === 'number') {
            num = value;
        } else if (typeof value === 'string') {
            const m = value.trim().match(/([\d.]+)(px|em|rem|%)?/i);
            if (m) {
                num = parseFloat(m[1]);
                const unit = (m[2] || 'px').toLowerCase();
                if (unit === 'em' || unit === 'rem') num = num * 16;
                if (unit === '%') num = 16 * (num / 100);
            }
        }
        if (num > 20) num = 20;
        if (num < 10) num = 10;
        return `${Math.round(num)}px`;
    };

    // Renk yardımcıları (chroma.js)
    const isValidColor = (color) => {
        try { return chroma.valid(color); } catch (e) { return false; }
    };

    const getRandomHex = () => chroma.random().hex();

    const getRandomRgbaString = (minAlpha = 0.3, maxAlpha = 0.9) =>
        chroma.random().alpha(getRandomFloat(minAlpha, maxAlpha, 2)).css();

    const getContrastingColor = (
        bgColor = '#ffffff',
        lightTarget = '#FFFFFF',
        darkTarget = '#112240'
    ) => {
        try {
            if (!isValidColor(bgColor)) return darkTarget;
            if (typeof bgColor === 'string' && bgColor.startsWith('var(--')) {
                const computed = getComputedStyle(previewBox)
                    .getPropertyValue(bgColor.slice(4, -1))
                    .trim();
                if (isValidColor(computed)) bgColor = computed;
                else return darkTarget;
            }
            return chroma.contrast(bgColor, lightTarget) >= 4.5 ? lightTarget : darkTarget;
        } catch (e) {
            return darkTarget;
        }
    };

    const generatePalette = (
        count = 3,
        type = 'analogous',
        baseColor = chroma.random()
    ) => {
        if (!isValidColor(baseColor)) baseColor = chroma.random();
        try {
            let scaleColors;
            const options = [
                'analogous',
                'monochromatic',
                'complementary',
                'triadic',
                'split',
                'tetradic',
                'random',
            ];
            type = options.includes(type) ? type : 'random';

            switch (type) {
                case 'analogous':
                    scaleColors = [
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '-30'),
                        baseColor,
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+30'),
                    ];
                    break;
                case 'monochromatic':
                    scaleColors = chroma
                        .scale([
                            baseColor.darken(1.5),
                            baseColor,
                            baseColor.brighten(1.5),
                        ])
                        .mode('lch')
                        .colors(count);
                    break;
                case 'complementary':
                    scaleColors = [baseColor, baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+180')];
                    break;
                case 'triadic':
                    scaleColors = [
                        baseColor,
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+120'),
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+240'),
                    ];
                    break;
                case 'split':
                    scaleColors = [
                        baseColor,
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+150'),
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+210'),
                    ];
                    break;
                case 'tetradic':
                    scaleColors = [
                        baseColor,
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+90'),
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+180'),
                        baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+270'),
                    ];
                    break;
                default:
                    scaleColors = Array.from(
                        { length: Math.max(count, 2) },
                        () => chroma.random()
                    );
            }

            if (scaleColors.length > 1 && count > scaleColors.length) {
                return chroma
                    .scale(scaleColors)
                    .mode('lch')
                    .padding(0.1)
                    .correctLightness(true)
                    .colors(count);
            } else if (scaleColors.length > 1) {
                return chroma.scale(scaleColors).mode('lch').colors(count);
            } else {
                return scaleColors;
            }
        } catch (e) {
            return Array.from({ length: count }, () => chroma.random().hex());
        }
    };

    const adjustColor = (color, prop = 'darken', amount = 1) => {
        try {
            return isValidColor(color) ? chroma(color)[prop](amount).hex() : color;
        } catch (e) {
            return color;
        }
    };

    // CSS değer üreticiler
    const getRandomAngle = (allowNegative = false) =>
        `${getRandomInt(allowNegative ? -360 : 0, 360)}deg`;

    const getRandomPercent = (min = 0, max = 100) =>
        `${getRandomInt(min, max)}%`;

    const getRandomPixel = (min, max, allowNegative = false) =>
        `${getRandomInt(allowNegative ? min : Math.max(0, min), max)}px`;

    const getRandomTime = (minMs = 100, maxMs = 3500) =>
        `${getRandomInt(minMs, maxMs)}ms`;

    const getRandomTimingFunction = () =>
        getRandomFromList(['ease', 'linear', 'ease-in', 'ease-out', 'ease-in-out']);

    const getRandomCubicBezier = () =>
        `cubic-bezier(${getRandomFloat(0, 1, 2)}, ${getRandomFloat(
            0,
            1.5,
            2
        )}, ${getRandomFloat(0, 1, 2)}, ${getRandomFloat(0, 1.5, 2)})`;

    const getRandomBlendMode = () =>
        getRandomFromList([
            'normal',
            'multiply',
            'screen',
            'overlay',
            'darken',
            'lighten',
            'color-dodge',
            'color-burn',
            'hard-light',
            'soft-light',
            'difference',
            'exclusion',
            'hue',
            'saturation',
            'color',
            'luminosity',
        ]);

    const getRandomCssVariable = (prefix = '--') => {
        try {
            const styles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
            const vars = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < styles.length; i++) {
                if (styles[i].startsWith(prefix)) vars.push(`var(${styles[i]})`);
            }
            return vars.length > 0 ? getRandomFromList(vars) : null;
        } catch (e) {
            return null;
        }
    };

    // Listeler
    const fontList = [
        "'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif",
        "'Poppins', sans-serif",
        "'Roboto', sans-serif",
        "Arial, sans-serif",
        "'Courier New', monospace",
        "Georgia, serif",
        "'Verdana', sans-serif",
        "'Fira Code', monospace",
        "'Comic Sans MS', cursive",
        "'Impact', sans-serif",
        "'Press Start 2P', cursive",
        "'Orbitron', sans-serif",
        "'Raleway', sans-serif",
        "'Oswald', sans-serif",
        "'Lora', serif",
        "'Merriweather', serif",
    ];

    const cursorList = [
        'auto',
        'default',
        'pointer',
        'wait',
        'text',
        'move',
        'grab',
        'grabbing',
        'zoom-in',
        'zoom-out',
        'not-allowed',
        'help',
        'crosshair',
    ];

    const userSelectList = ['auto', 'text', 'none', 'all'];
    const animationDirectionList = ['normal', 'reverse', 'alternate', 'alternate-reverse'];
    const animationFillModeList = ['none', 'forwards', 'backwards', 'both'];
    const simpleAnimationNames = [
        'K3N4N-Pulse',
        'K3N4N-Spin',
        'K3N4N-FadeInOut',
        'K3N4N-Shake',
        'K3N4N-Bounce',
        'K3N4N-Glitch',
        'K3N4N-Float',
    ];

    // Debounce
    function debounce(func, wait) {
        let timeout;
        return function (...args) {
            clearTimeout(timeout);
            timeout = setTimeout(() => func.apply(this, args), wait);
        };
    }
    const debouncedUpdateAndSave = debounce(() => {
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    }, 300);

    // --- Renk Seçicileri (iro.js) ---
    const initColorPickers = () => {
        Object.entries(colorPickerElements).forEach(([key, cfg]) => {
            const input = document.getElementById(cfg.inputId);
            const containerId = cfg.containerId || (key); // HTML'de id'ler direkt verilmiş
            const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
            if (!input || !container) return;

            const picker = new iro.ColorPicker(container, {
                width: 160,
                color: input.value || cfg.default,
                layout: [
                    { component: iro.ui.Box },
                    { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'hue' } },
                    { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'alpha' } },
                ],
            });
            colorPickers[key] = { instance: picker, input };

            picker.on('color:change', (color) => {
                input.value = color.hex8String;
                if (cfg.styleProp) {
                    currentStyles[cfg.styleProp] = color.hex8String;
                    debouncedUpdateAndSave();
                } else {
                    if (cfg.inputId === 'textShadowColor') {
                        debouncedSetTextShadow();
                    } else if (cfg.inputId === 'textStrokeColor') {
                        debouncedSetTextStroke();
                    } else if (cfg.inputId === 'textFillColor') {
                        currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor = color.hex8String;
                        updatePreviewAndOutput();
                        saveHistory();
                    }
                }
            });
        });
    };

    // --- Text Shadow / Stroke ---

    const setTextShadowFromInputs = () => {
        const x = document.getElementById('textShadowX').value || 0;
        const y = document.getElementById('textShadowY').value || 0;
        const blur = document.getElementById('textShadowBlur').value || 0;
        const color =
            colorPickers.textShadowColorPicker?.instance.rgbaString ||
            'rgba(0,0,0,0)';

        let shadowValue = '';
        if (x != 0 || y != 0 || blur != 0) {
            shadowValue = `${x}px ${y}px ${blur}px ${color}`;
        }

        const manualInput = document.getElementById('textShadowManual');
        if (!shadowValue && manualInput.value.trim()) {
            currentStyles.textShadow = manualInput.value.trim();
        } else {
            if (shadowValue) currentStyles.textShadow = shadowValue;
            else delete currentStyles.textShadow;
            manualInput.value = currentStyles.textShadow || '';
        }
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    };
    const debouncedSetTextShadow = debounce(setTextShadowFromInputs, 250);

    const setTextStrokeFromInputs = () => {
        const width = document.getElementById('textStrokeWidth').value || 0;
        const color =
            colorPickers.textStrokeColorPicker?.instance.hexString || '#000000';

        if (width > 0) {
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth = `${width}px`;
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor = color;
            currentStyles.textStrokeWidth = `${width}px`;
            currentStyles.textStrokeColor = color;
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'stroke';

            if (
                !currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor ||
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor !== 'transparent'
            ) {
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor =
                    currentStyles.color || colorPickerElements.textColorPicker.default;
            }
        } else {
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth;
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeWidth;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeColor;
            if (activeWebkitTextEffect === 'stroke') activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        }

        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    };
    const debouncedSetTextStroke = debounce(setTextStrokeFromInputs, 250);

    const clearTextClipEffect = (clearBackground = true) => {
        delete currentStyles.webkitBackgroundClip;
        delete currentStyles.backgroundClip;
        delete currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor;
        delete currentStyles.textFillColor;
        if (clearBackground) {
            delete currentStyles.backgroundImage;
            delete currentStyles.background;
        }
        if (currentStyles.color === 'transparent') {
            currentStyles.color =
                colorPickers.textColorPicker?.instance.hexString ||
                colorPickerElements.textColorPicker.default;
        }
        if (activeWebkitTextEffect === 'image' || activeWebkitTextEffect === 'gradient') {
            activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        }
    };

    const setBackgroundForTextClip = (type, value) => {
        clearTextClipEffect(false);

        if (type === 'image' && value) {
            currentStyles.backgroundImage = `url('${value}')`;
            currentStyles.backgroundSize =
                document.getElementById('textBackgroundSize').value || 'cover';
            currentStyles.backgroundRepeat =
                document.getElementById('textBackgroundRepeat').value || 'no-repeat';
            currentStyles.backgroundPosition =
                document.getElementById('textBackgroundPosition').value || 'center';
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'image';
        } else if (type === 'gradient' && value) {
            currentStyles.background = value;
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'gradient';
        } else return;

        currentStyles.webkitBackgroundClip = 'text';
        currentStyles.backgroundClip = 'text';
        currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
        currentStyles.textFillColor = 'transparent';
        currentStyles.color = 'transparent';
        delete currentStyles.backgroundColor;

        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    };

    const handleAnimationKeyframesChange = () => {
        const keyframesValue = animationKeyframesInput.value.trim();
        if (keyframesValue && keyframesValue.includes('@keyframes')) {
            currentAnimation.keyframes = keyframesValue;
        } else {
            currentAnimation.keyframes = null;
        }
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
    };
    const debouncedHandleAnimationKeyframesChange = debounce(
        handleAnimationKeyframesChange,
        400
    );

    // --- RASTGELE / OTOMATİK STİLLER ---

    const applyRandomFont = () => {
        currentStyles.fontFamily = getRandomFromList(fontList);
        currentStyles.fontSize = clampFontSizePx(getRandomInt(12, 20));
        currentStyles.fontWeight = getRandomFromList([
            '100',
            '300',
            '400',
            '600',
            '700',
            '900',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomColor = () => {
        const paletteType = getRandomFromList([
            'analogous',
            'monochromatic',
            'complementary',
            'triadic',
            'random',
        ]);
        const palette = generatePalette(5, paletteType);
        currentStyles.color = palette[0];
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) {
            const shadowColor = chroma(palette[1]).alpha(0.6).css();
            currentStyles.textShadow = `2px 2px 4px ${shadowColor}`;
        } else {
            delete currentStyles.textShadow;
        }
    };

    const applyRandomTextShadow = () => {
        const offsetX = getRandomInt(-3, 6);
        const offsetY = getRandomInt(-3, 6);
        const blur = getRandomInt(0, 8);
        const color = getRandomRgbaString(0.4, 0.9);
        currentStyles.textShadow = `${offsetX}px ${offsetY}px ${blur}px ${color}`;
    };

    const applyRandomTextDecoration = () => {
        const line = getRandomFromList([
            'none',
            'underline',
            'overline',
            'line-through',
        ]);
        const style = getRandomFromList([
            'solid',
            'double',
            'dotted',
            'dashed',
            'wavy',
        ]);
        const thickness = getRandomInt(1, 4);
        const color = getRandomHex();
        currentStyles.textDecorationLine = line;
        currentStyles.textDecorationStyle = style;
        currentStyles.textDecorationThickness = `${thickness}px`;
        currentStyles.textDecorationColor = color;
    };

    const applyRandomSpacing = () => {
        currentStyles.letterSpacing = `${getRandomFloat(-1, 5, 1)}px`;
        currentStyles.wordSpacing = `${getRandomInt(0, 15)}px`;
        currentStyles.lineHeight = getRandomFloat(1, 2.5, 2);
    };

    const applyRandomTextTransform = () => {
        currentStyles.textTransform = getRandomFromList([
            'none',
            'uppercase',
            'lowercase',
            'capitalize',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomTextAlign = () => {
        currentStyles.textAlign = getRandomFromList([
            'left',
            'center',
            'right',
            'justify',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomBgColor = () => {
        currentStyles.backgroundColor = getRandomRgbaString(0.8, 1);
        delete currentStyles.backgroundImage;
        delete currentStyles.background;
        if (activeWebkitTextEffect) clearTextClipEffect(false);
    };

    const applyRandomGradient = () => {
        const type = getRandomFromList(['linear', 'radial', 'conic']);
        const palette = generatePalette(3, 'random');
        const stops = palette.map((c, i) => `${c} ${i * 50}%`).join(', ');
        if (type === 'linear') {
            currentStyles.background = `linear-gradient(${getRandomAngle(
                true
            )}, ${stops})`;
        } else if (type === 'radial') {
            currentStyles.background = `radial-gradient(circle, ${stops})`;
        } else {
            currentStyles.background = `conic-gradient(from ${getRandomAngle(
                true
            )}, ${stops})`;
        }
        delete currentStyles.backgroundColor;
        delete currentStyles.backgroundImage;
    };

    const applyRandomBgImage = () => {
        const categories = [
            'nature',
            'abstract',
            'city',
            'tech',
            'space',
            'pattern',
        ];
        const cat = getRandomFromList(categories);
        const url = `https://source.unsplash.com/random/800x600/?${encodeURIComponent(
            cat
        )}`;
        currentStyles.backgroundImage = `url('${url}')`;
        currentStyles.backgroundSize = getRandomFromList([
            'cover',
            'contain',
            '100% 100%',
        ]);
        currentStyles.backgroundRepeat = getRandomFromList([
            'no-repeat',
            'repeat',
            'repeat-x',
            'repeat-y',
        ]);
        currentStyles.backgroundPosition = getRandomFromList([
            'center',
            'top',
            'bottom',
            'left',
            'right',
            'top left',
            'top right',
            'bottom left',
            'bottom right',
        ]);
        if (!currentStyles.backgroundColor)
            currentStyles.backgroundColor = getRandomRgbaString(0.6, 1);
    };

    const applyRandomBgProps = () => {
        if (currentStyles.backgroundImage) {
            currentStyles.backgroundSize = getRandomFromList([
                'auto',
                'cover',
                'contain',
                '100% 100%',
                '50%',
            ]);
            currentStyles.backgroundRepeat = getRandomFromList([
                'repeat',
                'no-repeat',
                'repeat-x',
                'repeat-y',
                'round',
                'space',
            ]);
            currentStyles.backgroundPosition = `${getRandomPercent()} ${getRandomPercent()}`;
        }
    };

    const applyRandomBgBlendMode = () => {
        currentStyles.backgroundBlendMode = getRandomBlendMode();
    };

    const applyRandomBorder = () => {
        currentStyles.borderWidth = `${getRandomInt(0, 10)}px`;
        currentStyles.borderStyle = getRandomFromList([
            'none',
            'solid',
            'dashed',
            'dotted',
            'double',
            'groove',
            'ridge',
            'inset',
            'outset',
        ]);
        currentStyles.borderColor = getRandomRgbaString(0.5, 1);
        currentStyles.borderRadius = getRandomFromList([
            '0',
            '5px',
            '10px',
            '50%',
            '20px',
            '10px 30px',
            '30px 10px 30px 10px',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomSizePaddingMargin = () => {
        currentStyles.width = getRandomFromList([
            'auto',
            `${getRandomInt(150, 400)}px`,
            `${getRandomInt(30, 90)}%`,
        ]);
        currentStyles.height = getRandomFromList([
            'auto',
            `${getRandomInt(100, 300)}px`,
        ]);
        currentStyles.padding = `${getRandomInt(5, 30)}px ${getRandomInt(
            5,
            40
        )}px`;
        currentStyles.margin = getRandomFromList([
            '0 auto',
            `${getRandomInt(5, 30)}px auto`,
            `${getRandomInt(0, 20)}px`,
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomDisplayPosition = () => {
        currentStyles.display = getRandomFromList([
            'block',
            'inline-block',
            'flex',
            'grid',
        ]);
        currentStyles.position = getRandomFromList([
            'static',
            'relative',
            'absolute',
            'fixed',
            'sticky',
        ]);
        if (currentStyles.position !== 'static') {
            currentStyles.top = getRandomFromList([
                'auto',
                getRandomPixel(-20, 50, true),
            ]);
            currentStyles.left = getRandomFromList([
                'auto',
                getRandomPixel(-20, 50, true),
            ]);
        } else {
            delete currentStyles.top;
            delete currentStyles.left;
        }
    };

    const applyRandomBoxShadow = () => {
        const inset = getRandomBoolean(0.2) ? 'inset ' : '';
        const x = getRandomPixel(-10, 15, true);
        const y = getRandomPixel(-10, 15, true);
        const blur = getRandomPixel(0, 25);
        const spread = getRandomPixel(-5, 10, true);
        const color = getRandomRgbaString(0.3, 0.9);
        currentStyles.boxShadow = `${inset}${x} ${y} ${blur} ${spread} ${color}`;
    };

    const applyRandomOpacity = () => {
        const val = getRandomFloat(0.3, 1, 2);
        currentStyles.opacity = val;
        if (opacityValueSpan) opacityValueSpan.textContent = val;
    };

    const applyRandomFilter = () => {
        const filters = [];
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) filters.push(`blur(${getRandomInt(0, 5)}px)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6))
            filters.push(`brightness(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.5, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4))
            filters.push(`contrast(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.5, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3))
            filters.push(`saturate(${getRandomFloat(0.5, 2, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3))
            filters.push(`hue-rotate(${getRandomInt(0, 360)}deg)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.2))
            filters.push(
                `drop-shadow(${getRandomPixel(
                    -5,
                    5,
                    true
                )} ${getRandomPixel(-5, 5, true)} ${getRandomPixel(
                    0,
                    10
                )} ${getRandomRgbaString(0.3, 0.8)})`
            );
        currentStyles.filter = filters.join(' ');
    };

    const applyRandomTransform = () => {
        const transforms = [];
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7))
            transforms.push(`rotate(${getRandomInt(-30, 30)}deg)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7))
            transforms.push(
                `scale(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.4, 2)}, ${getRandomFloat(
                    0.7,
                    1.4,
                    2
                )})`
            );
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5))
            transforms.push(
                `skew(${getRandomInt(-15, 15)}deg, ${getRandomInt(
                    -15,
                    15
                )}deg)`
            );
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4))
            transforms.push(
                `translate(${getRandomPixel(
                    -30,
                    30,
                    true
                )}, ${getRandomPixel(-20, 20, true)})`
            );
        currentStyles.transform = transforms.join(' ');
        currentStyles.transformOrigin = getRandomFromList([
            'center',
            'top',
            'bottom',
            'left',
            'right',
            'top left',
            'top right',
            'bottom left',
            'bottom right',
        ]);
    };

    const applyRandomCursor = () => {
        currentStyles.cursor = getRandomFromList(cursorList);
    };

    const applyRandomUserSelect = () => {
        currentStyles.userSelect = getRandomFromList(userSelectList);
    };

    const applyRandomTextStroke = () => {
        const width = getRandomInt(0, 4);
        if (width === 0) {
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth;
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeWidth;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeColor;
            if (activeWebkitTextEffect === 'stroke') activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        } else {
            const color = getRandomHex();
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth = `${width}px`;
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor = color;
            currentStyles.textStrokeWidth = `${width}px`;
            currentStyles.textStrokeColor = color;
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'stroke';
            if (
                !currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor ||
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor === 'transparent'
            ) {
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor =
                    currentStyles.color || colorPickerElements.textColorPicker.default;
            }
        }
    };

    const applyRandomTextGradient = () => {
        const palette = generatePalette(3, 'random');
        const angle = getRandomAngle();
        const gradient = `linear-gradient(${angle}, ${palette.join(', ')})`;
        setBackgroundForTextClip('gradient', gradient);
    };

    const applyRandomTextImage = () => {
        const categories = ['texture', 'pattern', 'metal', 'fire', 'water', 'sky'];
        const cat = getRandomFromList(categories);
        const url = `https://source.unsplash.com/random/800x600/?${encodeURIComponent(
            cat
        )}`;
        setBackgroundForTextClip('image', url);
        const textBgInput = document.getElementById('textBackgroundImageUrl');
        if (textBgInput) textBgInput.value = url;
    };

    const applyRandomAnimation = () => {
        const name = getRandomFromList(simpleAnimationNames);
        currentStyles.animationName = name;
        currentStyles.animationDuration = getRandomTime(500, 3000);
        currentStyles.animationTimingFunction = getRandomFromList([
            getRandomTimingFunction(),
            getRandomCubicBezier(),
        ]);
        currentStyles.animationDelay = getRandomTime(0, 1000);
        currentStyles.animationIterationCount = getRandomFromList([
            'infinite',
            '1',
            '2',
            '3',
            '5',
        ]);
        currentStyles.animationDirection = getRandomFromList(animationDirectionList);
        currentStyles.animationFillMode = getRandomFromList(animationFillModeList);

        switch (name) {
            case 'K3N4N-Pulse':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Pulse {
  0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 1; }
  100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Spin':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Spin {
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-FadeInOut':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-FadeInOut {
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  50% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Shake':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Shake {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
  20%, 60% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
  40%, 80% { transform: translateX(5px); }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Bounce':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Bounce {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-15px); }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Glitch':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Glitch {
  0% { transform: translate(0); }
  20% { transform: translate(-2px, 2px); }
  40% { transform: translate(-2px, -2px); }
  60% { transform: translate(2px, 2px); }
  80% { transform: translate(2px, -2px); }
  100% { transform: translate(0); }
}`;
                break;
            case 'K3N4N-Float':
                currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Float {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
}`;
                break;
            default:
                currentAnimation.keyframes = null;
        }
    };

    // Presetler
    const applyTextShadowPreset = (preset) => {
        switch (preset) {
            case 'light':
                currentStyles.textShadow = '1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
                break;
            case 'medium':
                currentStyles.textShadow = '2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
                break;
            case 'neon':
                currentStyles.textShadow = `0 0 5px #fff, 0 0 10px ${getRandomHex()}, 0 0 20px ${getRandomHex()}`;
                break;
            case 'soft':
                currentStyles.textShadow = '0 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
                break;
            case 'double':
                currentStyles.textShadow =
                    '1px 1px 0 #000, -1px -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5)';
                break;
            default:
                return;
        }
    };

    const applyBoxShadowPreset = (preset) => {
        switch (preset) {
            case 'light':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
                break;
            case 'medium':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)';
                break;
            case 'heavy':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)';
                break;
            case 'inset':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = 'inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
                break;
            case 'colored':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = `0 0 10px ${getRandomHex()}, 0 0 20px ${getRandomHex()}`;
                break;
            case 'neumorphism-light':
                currentStyles.boxShadow =
                    '9px 9px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.25), -9px -9px 16px rgba(255,255,255,0.7)';
                currentStyles.backgroundColor = '#e0e0e0';
                currentStyles.borderRadius = '20px';
                break;
            case 'neumorphism-dark':
                currentStyles.boxShadow =
                    '9px 9px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.85), -9px -9px 16px rgba(50,50,50,0.5)';
                currentStyles.backgroundColor = '#2b2b2b';
                currentStyles.borderRadius = '20px';
                currentStyles.color = '#f5f5f5';
                break;
            default:
                return;
        }
    };

    // Akıllı setler
    const applyAutoGeneric = () => {
        if (!currentStyles.backgroundColor && !currentStyles.background) {
            applyRandomBgColor();
        }
        if (!currentStyles.color) {
            currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(
                currentStyles.backgroundColor || '#ffffff'
            );
        }
        if (!currentStyles.fontFamily || !currentStyles.fontSize) {
            applyRandomFont();
        }
        if (!currentStyles.padding) currentStyles.padding = '20px';
        if (!currentStyles.borderRadius) currentStyles.borderRadius = '8px';
        if (!currentStyles.boxShadow) applyBoxShadowPreset('medium');
    };

    const applyAutoContrastText = () => {
        const bg =
            currentStyles.backgroundColor ||
            (currentStyles.background && getRandomHex()) ||
            '#ffffff';
        currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(bg);
    };

    const applyAutoShadow = () => {
        const bg =
            currentStyles.backgroundColor ||
            (currentStyles.background && getRandomHex()) ||
            '#ffffff';
        const darker = adjustColor(bg, 'darken', 1.2);
        currentStyles.boxShadow = `0 8px 18px ${chroma(darker).alpha(0.7).css()}`;
    };

    const applyAutoGradient = () => {
        const base =
            currentStyles.backgroundColor ||
            (currentStyles.background && getRandomHex()) ||
            '#3498db';
        const palette = generatePalette(3, 'analogous', base);
        currentStyles.background = `linear-gradient(135deg, ${palette.join(', ')})`;
        delete currentStyles.backgroundColor;
        if (!currentStyles.color) {
            currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(palette[1]);
        }
    };

    const applyAutoTheme = () => {
        const varColor = getRandomCssVariable('--accent-color') || 'var(--accent-color)';
        currentStyles.border = `1px solid ${varColor}`;
        currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)';
        currentStyles.borderRadius = '10px';
        currentStyles.padding = currentStyles.padding || '18px 24px';
        currentStyles.fontFamily = currentStyles.fontFamily || "'Poppins', sans-serif";
        currentStyles.fontSize = currentStyles.fontSize || '18px';
        currentStyles.color = currentStyles.color || 'var(--text-primary)';
        currentStyles.backgroundColor =
            currentStyles.backgroundColor || 'var(--bg-light)';
    };

    const applyRandomTextSet = () => {
        applyRandomFont();
        applyRandomColor();
        applyRandomSpacing();
        applyRandomTextTransform();
        applyRandomTextAlign();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomTextShadow();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4)) applyRandomTextDecoration();
    };

    const applyRandomBgSet = () => {
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomBgColor();
        else applyRandomGradient();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomBgImage();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) applyRandomBgProps();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3)) applyRandomBgBlendMode();
    };

    const applyRandomShapeSet = () => {
        applyRandomSizePaddingMargin();
        applyRandomBorder();
        applyRandomDisplayPosition();
    };

    const applyRandomEffectSet = () => {
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomBoxShadow();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomOpacity();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomFilter();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomTransform();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) applyRandomCursor();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomUserSelect();
    };

    const applyRandomWebkitTextSet = () => {
        applyRandomTextStroke();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomTextGradient();
        else applyRandomTextImage();
    };

    const applyRandomAnimationSet = () => {
        applyRandomAnimation();
    };

    const applyRandomMix = () => {
        applyRandomTextSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomBgSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomShapeSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.9)) applyRandomEffectSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomWebkitTextSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomAnimationSet();
    };

    const applyMaxChaos = () => {
        resetAllStyles(false);
        const actions = [
            applyRandomTextSet,
            applyRandomBgSet,
            applyRandomShapeSet,
            applyRandomEffectSet,
            applyRandomWebkitTextSet,
            applyRandomAnimationSet,
        ];
        shuffleArray(actions);
        actions.forEach((fn) => fn());
    };

    // --- Reset / History ---

    const resetAllStyles = (clearHistory = true) => {
        currentStyles = {};
        currentAnimation = { keyframes: null };
        activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        previewBox.removeAttribute('style');
        if (clearHistory) {
            styleHistory = [];
            historyIndex = -1;
            updateHistoryButtons();
        }
        updatePreviewAndOutput(false);
    };

    const saveHistory = () => {
        const snapshot = JSON.stringify({
            styles: currentStyles,
            animation: currentAnimation,
        });
        if (
            historyIndex >= 0 &&
            historyIndex < styleHistory.length &&
            styleHistory[historyIndex] === snapshot
        ) {
            return;
        }
        styleHistory = styleHistory.slice(0, historyIndex + 1);
        styleHistory.push(snapshot);
        if (styleHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) {
            styleHistory.shift();
        } else {
            historyIndex++;
        }
        updateHistoryButtons();
    };

    const loadHistory = (index) => {
        if (index < 0 || index >= styleHistory.length) return;
        const snapshot = JSON.parse(styleHistory[index]);
        currentStyles = snapshot.styles || {};
        currentAnimation = snapshot.animation || { keyframes: null };
        historyIndex = index;
        updateHistoryButtons();
        updatePreviewAndOutput(false);
    };

    const undo = () => {
        if (historyIndex > 0) loadHistory(historyIndex - 1);
    };

    const redo = () => {
        if (historyIndex < styleHistory.length - 1) loadHistory(historyIndex + 1);
    };

    const updateHistoryButtons = () => {
        if (undoBtn) undoBtn.disabled = historyIndex <= 0;
        if (redoBtn) redoBtn.disabled = historyIndex >= styleHistory.length - 1;
    };

    // --- CSS oluşturma / önizleme ---

    const generateCssString = () => {
        const lines = [];
        Object.entries(currentStyles).forEach(([prop, value]) => {
            if (value == null || value === '') return;
            if (prop.startsWith('#') || prop.startsWith('@') || prop.includes(':')) {
                // id tabanlı ekstra kuralları burada kullanmıyoruz
                return;
            }
            const cssProp = prop.replace(/[A-Z]/g, (m) => '-' + m.toLowerCase());
            lines.push(`  ${cssProp}: ${value};`);
        });
        let css = `#preview-box {\n${lines.join('\n')}\n}`;
        if (currentAnimation.keyframes) {
            css += `\n\n${currentAnimation.keyframes}`;
        }
        return css;
    };

    const updatePreviewAndOutput = (save = true) => {
        const styleString = generateCssString();
        cssOutput.value = styleString;

        previewBox.removeAttribute('style');
        Object.entries(currentStyles).forEach(([prop, value]) => {
            if (prop.startsWith('#') || prop.startsWith('@') || prop.includes(':')) return;
            try {
                previewBox.style[prop] = value;
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn('Stil uygulanamadı:', prop, value, e);
            }
        });

        if (!previewBox.textContent.trim()) {
            previewBox.classList.add('is-empty');
        } else {
            previewBox.classList.remove('is-empty');
        }

        copyCssBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();
        downloadCssBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();
        downloadHtmlBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();

        if (save) saveHistory();
    };

    // --- Kopyalama / İndirme ---

    const copyCssToClipboard = () => {
        const val = cssOutput.value.trim();
        if (!val) return;
        navigator.clipboard
            .writeText(val)
            .then(() => {
                copyCssBtn.classList.add('copied');
                copyCssBtn.innerHTML =
                    '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Kopyalandı!';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyCssBtn.classList.remove('copied');
                    copyCssBtn.innerHTML =
                        '<i class="fas fa-copy"></i> Kodu Kopyala';
                }, 1500);
            })
            .catch((err) => {
                console.error('Kopyalama hatası:', err);
                alert(
                    'Kopyalama başarısız oldu. Tarayıcı izinlerini kontrol edin.'
                );
            });
    };

    const downloadFile = (filename, content, type = 'text/plain') => {
        const blob = new Blob([content], { type });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = filename;
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        a.remove();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    };

    const downloadCss = () => {
        const val = cssOutput.value.trim();
        if (!val) return;
        downloadFile('k3n4n-style.css', val, 'text/css');
    };

    const downloadHtml = () => {
        const css = cssOutput.value.trim();
        if (!css) return;
        const html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>K3N4N Önizleme</title>
<style>
${css}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="preview-box">K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 Önizleme</div>
</body>
</html>`;
        downloadFile('k3n4n-preview.html', html, 'text/html');
    };

    // --- Yapıştırılan CSS ---

    const parseSimpleCssBlock = (cssText) => {
        const result = {};
        const lines = cssText
            .split('\n')
            .map((l) => l.trim())
            .filter(Boolean);
        lines.forEach((line) => {
            if (line.startsWith('@keyframes')) return;
            const m = line.match(/^([a-zA-Z-]+)\s*:\s*(.+);$/);
            if (!m) return;
            const prop = m[1].trim();
            const val = m[2].trim();
            const camel = prop.replace(/-([a-z])/g, (g) => g[1].toUpperCase());
            result[camel] = val;
        });
        return result;
    };

    const previewPastedCss = () => {
        const css = cssInputArea.value.trim();
        htmlPreviewArea.innerHTML = '';
        if (!css) {
            htmlPreviewArea.innerHTML =
                '<span class="preview-error">Önizlenecek CSS yok.</span>';
            return;
        }

        const simpleBlockMatch = css.match(/{([\s\S]*?)}/);
        const keyframesMatch = css.match(/@keyframes[\s\S]+?}/);
        const simpleBlock = simpleBlockMatch ? simpleBlockMatch[1] : css;
        const parsed = parseSimpleCssBlock(simpleBlock);

        const previewDiv = document.createElement('div');
        previewDiv.className = 'preview-wrapper';

        const inner = document.createElement('div');
        inner.className = 'preview-element';
        inner.textContent = 'Yapıştırılan CSS Önizleme';

        Object.entries(parsed).forEach(([prop, val]) => {
            try {
                inner.style[prop] = val;
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn('Önizleme stil hatası:', prop, val);
            }
        });

        previewDiv.appendChild(inner);

        if (keyframesMatch) {
            const info = document.createElement('div');
            info.style.marginTop = '8px';
            info.style.fontSize = '0.85em';
            info.style.opacity = '0.75';
            info.textContent =
                '@keyframes kuralları algılandı ve ana CSS çıktısına eklenebilir.';
            previewDiv.appendChild(info);
        }

        htmlPreviewArea.appendChild(previewDiv);
    };

    const addPastedCssToMain = () => {
        const css = cssInputArea.value.trim();
        if (!css) return;
        const simpleBlockMatch = css.match(/{([\s\S]*?)}/);
        const keyframesMatch = css.match(/@keyframes[\s\S]+?}/);
        const simpleBlock = simpleBlockMatch ? simpleBlockMatch[1] : css;
        const parsed = parseSimpleCssBlock(simpleBlock);
        Object.assign(currentStyles, parsed);
        if (keyframesMatch) {
            currentAnimation.keyframes = keyframesMatch[0];
            animationKeyframesInput.value = currentAnimation.keyframes;
        }
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
        saveHistory();
    };

    // --- Fieldset aç/kapa ---

    const initFieldsetToggles = () => {
        const fieldsets = document.querySelectorAll('.controls fieldset');
        fieldsets.forEach((fs) => {
            const legend = fs.querySelector('legend');
            if (!legend) return;
            legend.addEventListener('click', () => {
                fs.classList.toggle('expanded');
            });
        });
    };

    // --- Input Binding ---

    const initInputsBinding = () => {
        const allInputs = controlsArea.querySelectorAll(
            'input[data-style-prop], select[data-style-prop], textarea[data-style-prop]'
        );
        allInputs.forEach((el) => {
            const prop = el.getAttribute('data-style-prop');
            const unit = el.getAttribute('data-style-unit') || '';
            const handler = () => {
                let value = el.value;
                if (unit && value !== '' && !String(value).endsWith(unit)) {
                    value = `${value}${unit}`;
                }
                if (value === '') delete currentStyles[prop];
                else currentStyles[prop] = value;

                if (prop === 'opacity' && opacityValueSpan) {
                    opacityValueSpan.textContent = value;
                }
                debouncedUpdateAndSave();
            };
            el.addEventListener('input', handler);
            el.addEventListener('change', handler);
        });

        const opacityEl = document.getElementById('opacity');
        if (opacityEl && opacityValueSpan) {
            opacityValueSpan.textContent = opacityEl.value;
        }

        ['textShadowX', 'textShadowY', 'textShadowBlur'].forEach((id) => {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (!el) return;
            el.addEventListener('input', debouncedSetTextShadow);
            el.addEventListener('change', debouncedSetTextShadow);
        });

        const textShadowManual = document.getElementById('textShadowManual');
        if (textShadowManual) {
            textShadowManual.addEventListener('input', () => {
                const value = textShadowManual.value.trim();
                if (value) currentStyles.textShadow = value;
                else delete currentStyles.textShadow;
                debouncedUpdateAndSave();
            });
        }

        const textStrokeWidthEl = document.getElementById('textStrokeWidth');
        if (textStrokeWidthEl) {
            textStrokeWidthEl.addEventListener('input', debouncedSetTextStroke);
            textStrokeWidthEl.addEventListener('change', debouncedSetTextStroke);
        }

        const bgImageUrlInput = document.getElementById('backgroundImageUrl');
        if (bgImageUrlInput) {
            const handler = () => {
                const url = bgImageUrlInput.value.trim();
                if (url) currentStyles.backgroundImage = `url('${url}')`;
                else delete currentStyles.backgroundImage;
                debouncedUpdateAndSave();
            };
            bgImageUrlInput.addEventListener('change', handler);
            bgImageUrlInput.addEventListener('blur', handler);
        }

        const textBgImageUrlInput = document.getElementById('textBackgroundImageUrl');
        if (textBgImageUrlInput) {
            const handler = () => {
                const url = textBgImageUrlInput.value.trim();
                if (url) setBackgroundForTextClip('image', url);
                else clearTextClipEffect(true);
            };
            textBgImageUrlInput.addEventListener('change', handler);
            textBgImageUrlInput.addEventListener('blur', handler);
        }

        if (animationKeyframesInput) {
            animationKeyframesInput.addEventListener(
                'input',
                debouncedHandleAnimationKeyframesChange
            );
        }
    };

    // --- Butonlar ---

    const initButtons = () => {
        controlsArea.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const btn = e.target.closest('button');
            if (!btn) return;

            const styleTarget = btn.getAttribute('data-style-target');
            const presetTarget = btn.getAttribute('data-preset-target');
            const presetValue = btn.getAttribute('data-preset-value');
            const action = btn.getAttribute('data-action');

            if (styleTarget) {
                e.preventDefault();
                switch (styleTarget) {
                    case 'random-font':
                        applyRandomFont();
                        break;
                    case 'random-color':
                        applyRandomColor();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-shadow':
                        applyRandomTextShadow();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-decoration':
                        applyRandomTextDecoration();
                        break;
                    case 'random-spacing':
                        applyRandomSpacing();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-transform':
                        applyRandomTextTransform();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-align':
                        applyRandomTextAlign();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-color':
                        applyRandomBgColor();
                        break;
                    case 'random-gradient':
                        applyRandomGradient();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-image':
                        applyRandomBgImage();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-props':
                        applyRandomBgProps();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-blend-mode':
                        applyRandomBgBlendMode();
                        break;
                    case 'random-border':
                        applyRandomBorder();
                        break;
                    case 'random-size-padding-margin':
                        applyRandomSizePaddingMargin();
                        break;
                    case 'random-display-position':
                        applyRandomDisplayPosition();
                        break;
                    case 'random-box-shadow':
                        applyRandomBoxShadow();
                        break;
                    case 'random-opacity':
                        applyRandomOpacity();
                        break;
                    case 'random-filter':
                        applyRandomFilter();
                        break;
                    case 'random-transform':
                        applyRandomTransform();
                        break;
                    case 'random-cursor':
                        applyRandomCursor();
                        break;
                    case 'random-user-select':
                        applyRandomUserSelect();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-stroke':
                        applyRandomTextStroke();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-gradient':
                        applyRandomTextGradient();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-image':
                        applyRandomTextImage();
                        break;
                    case 'random-animation':
                        applyRandomAnimation();
                        break;
                    case 'random-text-set':
                        applyRandomTextSet();
                        break;
                    case 'random-bg-set':
                        applyRandomBgSet();
                        break;
                    case 'random-shape-set':
                        applyRandomShapeSet();
                        break;
                    case 'random-effect-set':
                        applyRandomEffectSet();
                        break;
                    case 'random-webkit-text-set':
                        applyRandomWebkitTextSet();
                        break;
                    case 'random-animation-set':
                        applyRandomAnimationSet();
                        break;
                    case 'auto-generic':
                        applyAutoGeneric();
                        break;
                    case 'auto-contrast-text':
                        applyAutoContrastText();
                        break;
                    case 'auto-shadow':
                        applyAutoShadow();
                        break;
                    case 'auto-gradient':
                        applyAutoGradient();
                        break;
                    case 'auto-theme':
                        applyAutoTheme();
                        break;
                    case 'random-mix':
                        applyRandomMix();
                        break;
                    case 'max-chaos':
                        applyMaxChaos();
                        break;
                    default:
                        break;
                }
                updatePreviewAndOutput();
                saveHistory();
                return;
            }

            if (presetTarget) {
                e.preventDefault();
                if (presetTarget === 'text-shadow') {
                    applyTextShadowPreset(presetValue);
                } else if (presetTarget === 'box-shadow') {
                    applyBoxShadowPreset(presetValue);
                }
                updatePreviewAndOutput();
                saveHistory();
                return;
            }

            if (action) {
                e.preventDefault();
                switch (action) {
                    case 'clear-text-shadow':
                        delete currentStyles.textShadow;
                        document.getElementById('textShadowManual').value = '';
                        document.getElementById('textShadowX').value = 0;
                        document.getElementById('textShadowY').value = 0;
                        document.getElementById('textShadowBlur').value = 0;
                        updatePreviewAndOutput();
                        saveHistory();
                        break;
                    case 'clear-box-shadow':
                        delete currentStyles.boxShadow;
                        document.getElementById('boxShadowManual').value = '';
                        updatePreviewAndOutput();
                        saveHistory();
                        break;
                    case 'set-text-fill-transparent':
                        currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent';
                        currentStyles.textFillColor = 'transparent';
                        currentStyles.color = 'transparent';
                        updatePreviewAndOutput();
                        saveHistory();
                        break;
                    case 'set-text-fill-currentcolor':
                        delete currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor;
                        delete currentStyles.textFillColor;
                        currentStyles.color =
                            colorPickers.textColorPicker?.instance.hexString ||
                            colorPickerElements.textColorPicker.default;
                        updatePreviewAndOutput();
                        saveHistory();
                        break;
                    case 'clear-animation':
                        delete currentStyles.animationName;
                        delete currentStyles.animationDuration;
                        delete currentStyles.animationTimingFunction;
                        delete currentStyles.animationDelay;
                        delete currentStyles.animationIterationCount;
                        delete currentStyles.animationDirection;
                        delete currentStyles.animationFillMode;
                        currentAnimation.keyframes = null;
                        if (animationKeyframesInput) animationKeyframesInput.value = '';
                        updatePreviewAndOutput();
                        saveHistory();
                        break;
                    case 'reset-all':
                        resetAllStyles(true);
                        break;
                    case 'preview-pasted-css':
                        previewPastedCss();
                        break;
                    case 'add-pasted-css':
                        addPastedCssToMain();
                        break;
                    case 'copy-css':
                        copyCssToClipboard();
                        break;
                    case 'download-css':
                        downloadCss();
                        break;
                    case 'download-html':
                        downloadHtml();
                        break;
                    case 'undo':
                        undo();
                        break;
                    case 'redo':
                        redo();
                        break;
                    default:
                        break;
                }
            }
        });

        if (undoBtn)
            undoBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                undo();
            });
        if (redoBtn)
            redoBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                redo();
            });

        if (copyCssBtn)
            copyCssBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                copyCssToClipboard();
            });
        if (downloadCssBtn)
            downloadCssBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                downloadCss();
            });
        if (downloadHtmlBtn)
            downloadHtmlBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                downloadHtml();
            });
    };

    // --- Başlat ---

    initColorPickers();
    initFieldsetToggles();
    initInputsBinding();
    initButtons();
    resetAllStyles(true);

    if (!previewBox.textContent.trim()) {
        previewBox.textContent = 'K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0';
        previewBox.classList.remove('is-empty');
    }
});
```

Eğer istersen bir sonraki adımda:

- Sadece “özel setler” (glassmorphism, neon, retro vs.) için ayrı butonlar ekleyip bağlayabilirim.
- Ya da kodu modüllere bölmek (örneğin random.js, ui.js) için de yapı çıkarabiliriz.

### Amazon Nova 2 Lite
*2025-12-10 02:16:52 +03*

Devam ediyorum, `generateAnimatedShapeGroup` ve diğer fonksiyonların tamamını yazıyorum. Lütfen aşağıdaki kodunu kontrol edelim:

```javascript
    // *** YENİ: Animasyonlu Şekil Gruplama Oluşturucu ***
    // Animasyonlu şekil gruplama
