Bu kodu, önceki gönderdiğin script kodunun bittiği yere (tekrar eden fonksiyonların hemen altına) yapıştırarak `<script>` etiketini kapatabilirsin.

```javascript
    // --- STANDART RASTGELELEŞTİRİCİLER (HTML Butonları ile Eşleşenler) ---

    const applyRandomTextShadow = () => {
        const offsetX = getRandomInt(-3, 6);
        const offsetY = getRandomInt(-3, 6);
        const blur = getRandomInt(0, 8);
        const color = getRandomRgbaString(0.4, 0.9);
        currentStyles.textShadow = `${offsetX}px ${offsetY}px ${blur}px ${color}`;
    };

    const applyRandomTextDecoration = () => {
        const line = getRandomFromList(['none', 'underline', 'overline', 'line-through']);
        const style = getRandomFromList(['solid', 'double', 'dotted', 'dashed', 'wavy']);
        const thickness = getRandomInt(1, 4);
        const color = getRandomHex();
        
        currentStyles.textDecorationLine = line;
        currentStyles.textDecorationStyle = style;
        currentStyles.textDecorationThickness = `${thickness}px`;
        currentStyles.textDecorationColor = color;
    };

    const applyRandomSpacing = () => {
        currentStyles.letterSpacing = `${getRandomFloat(-1, 5, 1)}px`;
        currentStyles.wordSpacing = `${getRandomInt(0, 15)}px`;
        currentStyles.lineHeight = getRandomFloat(1, 2.5, 2);
    };

    const applyRandomTextTransform = () => {
        currentStyles.textTransform = getRandomFromList(['none', 'uppercase', 'lowercase', 'capitalize']);
    };

    const applyRandomTextAlign = () => {
        currentStyles.textAlign = getRandomFromList(['left', 'center', 'right', 'justify']);
    };

    const applyRandomBgImage = () => {
        const categories = ['nature', 'abstract', 'city', 'tech', 'space', 'colors', 'pattern'];
        const cat = getRandomFromList(categories);
        // Unsplash Source (Not: Bazen yavaş yanıt verebilir)
        const url = `https://source.unsplash.com/random/800x600/?${encodeURIComponent(cat)}`;
        currentStyles.backgroundImage = `url('${url}')`;
        currentStyles.backgroundSize = getRandomFromList(['cover', 'contain', '100% 100%']);
        currentStyles.backgroundRepeat = getRandomFromList(['no-repeat', 'repeat', 'repeat-x', 'repeat-y']);
        currentStyles.backgroundPosition = getRandomFromList(['center', 'top', 'bottom', 'left', 'right']);
        
        // Okunabilirlik için bir arka plan rengi de atayalım
        if (!currentStyles.backgroundColor) currentStyles.backgroundColor = getRandomRgbaString(0.6, 1);
    };

    const applyRandomBgProps = () => {
        if (currentStyles.backgroundImage) {
            currentStyles.backgroundSize = getRandomFromList(['auto', 'cover', 'contain', '100% 100%', '50%']);
            currentStyles.backgroundRepeat = getRandomFromList(['repeat', 'no-repeat', 'round', 'space']);
            currentStyles.backgroundPosition = `${getRandomPercent()} ${getRandomPercent()}`;
        }
    };

    const applyRandomBgBlendMode = () => {
        currentStyles.backgroundBlendMode = getRandomBlendMode();
    };

    const applyRandomBorder = () => {
        currentStyles.borderWidth = `${getRandomInt(0, 10)}px`;
        currentStyles.borderStyle = getRandomFromList(['none', 'solid', 'dashed', 'dotted', 'double', 'groove', 'ridge', 'inset', 'outset']);
        currentStyles.borderColor = getRandomRgbaString(0.5, 1);
        currentStyles.borderRadius = getRandomFromList(['0', '5px', '10px', '50%', '20px', '10px 30px', '30px 10px 30px 10px']);
    };

    const applyRandomSizePaddingMargin = () => {
        currentStyles.width = getRandomFromList(['auto', `${getRandomInt(150, 400)}px`, `${getRandomInt(30, 90)}%`]);
        currentStyles.height = getRandomFromList(['auto', `${getRandomInt(100, 300)}px`]);
        currentStyles.padding = `${getRandomInt(5, 30)}px ${getRandomInt(5, 40)}px`;
        currentStyles.margin = getRandomFromList(['0 auto', `${getRandomInt(5, 30)}px auto`, `${getRandomInt(0, 20)}px`]);
    };

    const applyRandomDisplayPosition = () => {
        currentStyles.display = getRandomFromList(['block', 'inline-block', 'flex', 'grid']);
        currentStyles.position = getRandomFromList(['static', 'relative', 'absolute', 'fixed', 'sticky']);
        if (currentStyles.position !== 'static') {
            currentStyles.top = getRandomFromList(['auto', getRandomPixel(-20, 50, true)]);
            currentStyles.left = getRandomFromList(['auto', getRandomPixel(-20, 50, true)]);
            currentStyles.zIndex = getRandomInt(0, 10);
        } else {
            delete currentStyles.top; delete currentStyles.left; delete currentStyles.zIndex;
        }
    };

    const applyRandomBoxShadow = () => {
        const inset = getRandomBoolean(0.2) ? 'inset ' : '';
        const x = getRandomPixel(-10, 15, true);
        const y = getRandomPixel(-10, 15, true);
        const blur = getRandomPixel(0, 25);
        const spread = getRandomPixel(-5, 10, true);
        const color = getRandomRgbaString(0.3, 0.9);
        currentStyles.boxShadow = `${inset}${x} ${y} ${blur} ${spread} ${color}`;
    };

    const applyRandomOpacity = () => {
        const val = getRandomFloat(0.3, 1, 2);
        currentStyles.opacity = val;
        if (opacityValueSpan) opacityValueSpan.textContent = val;
        const opacityInput = document.getElementById('opacity');
        if (opacityInput) opacityInput.value = val;
    };

    const applyRandomFilter = () => {
        const filters = [];
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) filters.push(`blur(${getRandomInt(0, 5)}px)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) filters.push(`brightness(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.5, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4)) filters.push(`contrast(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.5, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3)) filters.push(`saturate(${getRandomFloat(0.5, 2, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3)) filters.push(`hue-rotate(${getRandomInt(0, 360)}deg)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.2)) filters.push(`drop-shadow(${getRandomPixel(-5, 5, true)} ${getRandomPixel(-5, 5, true)} ${getRandomPixel(0, 10)} ${getRandomRgbaString(0.3, 0.8)})`);
        currentStyles.filter = filters.join(' ');
    };

    const applyRandomTransform = () => {
        const transforms = [];
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) transforms.push(`rotate(${getRandomInt(-30, 30)}deg)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) transforms.push(`scale(${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.4, 2)}, ${getRandomFloat(0.7, 1.4, 2)})`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) transforms.push(`skew(${getRandomInt(-15, 15)}deg, ${getRandomInt(-15, 15)}deg)`);
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4)) transforms.push(`translate(${getRandomPixel(-30, 30, true)}, ${getRandomPixel(-20, 20, true)})`);
        
        currentStyles.transform = transforms.join(' ');
        currentStyles.transformOrigin = getRandomFromList(['center', 'top', 'bottom', 'left', 'right', 'top left']);
    };

    const applyRandomCursor = () => { currentStyles.cursor = getRandomFromList(cursorList); };
    const applyRandomUserSelect = () => { currentStyles.userSelect = getRandomFromList(userSelectList); };

    const applyRandomTextStroke = () => {
        const width = getRandomInt(0, 4);
        if (width === 0) {
            delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth; delete currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor;
            delete currentStyles.textStrokeWidth; delete currentStyles.textStrokeColor;
        } else {
            const color = getRandomHex();
            currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeWidth = `${width}px`; currentStyles.webkitTextStrokeColor = color;
            currentStyles.textStrokeWidth = `${width}px`; currentStyles.textStrokeColor = color;
            activeWebkitTextEffect = 'stroke';
            if (!currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor || currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor === 'transparent') {
                currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor = currentStyles.color || colorPickerElements.textColorPicker.default;
            }
        }
    };

    const applyRandomTextGradient = () => {
        const palette = generatePalette(3, 'random');
        const angle = getRandomAngle();
        const gradient = `linear-gradient(${angle}, ${palette.join(', ')})`;
        setBackgroundForTextClip('gradient', gradient);
    };

    const applyRandomTextImage = () => {
        const categories = ['texture', 'pattern', 'metal', 'fire', 'water', 'sky'];
        const cat = getRandomFromList(categories);
        const url = `https://source.unsplash.com/random/800x600/?${encodeURIComponent(cat)}`;
        setBackgroundForTextClip('image', url);
        document.getElementById('textBackgroundImageUrl').value = url;
    };

    const applyRandomAnimation = () => {
        const name = getRandomFromList(simpleAnimationNames);
        currentStyles.animationName = name;
        currentStyles.animationDuration = getRandomTime(500, 3000);
        currentStyles.animationTimingFunction = getRandomFromList([getRandomTimingFunction(), getRandomCubicBezier()]);
        currentStyles.animationDelay = getRandomTime(0, 1000);
        currentStyles.animationIterationCount = getRandomFromList(['infinite', '1', '2', '3', '5']);
        currentStyles.animationDirection = getRandomFromList(animationDirectionList);
        currentStyles.animationFillMode = getRandomFromList(animationFillModeList);

        // Basit Keyframe Tanımları
        switch (name) {
            case 'K3N4N-Pulse': currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; } }`; break;
            case 'K3N4N-Spin': currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Spin { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } }`; break;
            case 'K3N4N-FadeInOut': currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-FadeInOut { 0% { opacity: 0; } 50% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } }`; break;
            case 'K3N4N-Shake': currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Shake { 0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); } 20%, 60% { transform: translateX(-5px); } 40%, 80% { transform: translateX(5px); } }`; break;
            case 'K3N4N-Bounce': currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-15px); } }`; break;
            case 'K3N4N-Glitch': currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Glitch { 0% { transform: translate(0); } 20% { transform: translate(-2px, 2px); } 40% { transform: translate(-2px, -2px); } 60% { transform: translate(2px, 2px); } 80% { transform: translate(2px, -2px); } 100% { transform: translate(0); } }`; break;
            case 'K3N4N-Float': currentAnimation.keyframes = `@keyframes K3N4N-Float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } }`; break;
            default: currentAnimation.keyframes = null;
        }
    };

    // --- PRESET BUTONLARI ---

    const applyTextShadowPreset = (preset) => {
        switch (preset) {
            case 'light': currentStyles.textShadow = '1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'; break;
            case 'medium': currentStyles.textShadow = '2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'; break;
            case 'neon': currentStyles.textShadow = `0 0 5px #fff, 0 0 10px ${getRandomHex()}, 0 0 20px ${getRandomHex()}`; break;
            case 'soft': currentStyles.textShadow = '0 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'; break;
            case 'double': currentStyles.textShadow = '1px 1px 0 #000, -1px -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5)'; break;
        }
    };

    const applyBoxShadowPreset = (preset) => {
        switch (preset) {
            case 'light': currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'; break;
            case 'medium': currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)'; break;
            case 'heavy': currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)'; break;
            case 'inset': currentStyles.boxShadow = 'inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'; break;
            case 'colored': currentStyles.boxShadow = `0 0 10px ${getRandomHex()}, 0 0 20px ${getRandomHex()}`; break;
            case 'neumorphism-light': 
                currentStyles.boxShadow = '9px 9px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.25), -9px -9px 16px rgba(255,255,255,0.7)';
                currentStyles.backgroundColor = '#e0e0e0'; currentStyles.borderRadius = '20px'; break;
            case 'neumorphism-dark':
                currentStyles.boxShadow = '9px 9px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.85), -9px -9px 16px rgba(50,50,50,0.5)';
                currentStyles.backgroundColor = '#2b2b2b'; currentStyles.borderRadius = '20px'; currentStyles.color = '#f5f5f5'; break;
        }
    };

    // --- OTOMATİK AKILLI SETLER (V4.5) ---

    const applyAutoGeneric = () => {
        if (!currentStyles.backgroundColor && !currentStyles.background) applyRandomBgColor();
        if (!currentStyles.color) currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(currentStyles.backgroundColor || '#ffffff');
        if (!currentStyles.fontFamily || !currentStyles.fontSize) applyRandomFont();
        if (!currentStyles.padding) currentStyles.padding = '20px';
        if (!currentStyles.borderRadius) currentStyles.borderRadius = '8px';
        if (!currentStyles.boxShadow) applyBoxShadowPreset('medium');
    };

    const applyAutoContrastText = () => {
        const bg = currentStyles.backgroundColor || (currentStyles.background && getRandomHex()) || '#ffffff';
        currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(bg);
    };

    const applyAutoShadow = () => {
        const bg = currentStyles.backgroundColor || (currentStyles.background && getRandomHex()) || '#ffffff';
        const darker = adjustColor(bg, 'darken', 1.2);
        currentStyles.boxShadow = `0 8px 18px ${chroma(darker).alpha(0.7).css()}`;
    };

    const applyAutoGradient = () => {
        const base = currentStyles.backgroundColor || '#3498db';
        const palette = generatePalette(3, 'analogous', base);
        currentStyles.background = `linear-gradient(135deg, ${palette.join(', ')})`;
        delete currentStyles.backgroundColor;
        if (!currentStyles.color) currentStyles.color = getContrastingColor(palette[1]);
    };

    const applyAutoTheme = () => {
        const varColor = getRandomCssVariable('--accent-color') || 'var(--accent-color)';
        currentStyles.border = `1px solid ${varColor}`;
        currentStyles.boxShadow = '0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)';
        currentStyles.borderRadius = '10px';
        currentStyles.padding = currentStyles.padding || '18px 24px';
        currentStyles.color = currentStyles.color || 'var(--text-primary)';
        currentStyles.backgroundColor = currentStyles.backgroundColor || 'var(--bg-light)';
    };

    // --- BÜYÜK SETLER (Random Mix, Chaos vs) ---

    const applyRandomTextSet = () => {
        applyRandomFont(); applyRandomColor(); applyRandomSpacing(); applyRandomTextTransform(); applyRandomTextAlign();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomTextShadow();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.4)) applyRandomTextDecoration();
    };

    const applyRandomBgSet = () => {
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomBgColor(); else applyRandomGradient();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomBgImage();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) applyRandomBgProps();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.3)) applyRandomBgBlendMode();
    };

    const applyRandomShapeSet = () => { applyRandomSizePaddingMargin(); applyRandomBorder(); applyRandomDisplayPosition(); };
    
    const applyRandomEffectSet = () => {
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomBoxShadow();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomOpacity();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomFilter();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomTransform();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.6)) applyRandomCursor();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.5)) applyRandomUserSelect();
    };

    const applyRandomWebkitTextSet = () => { applyRandomTextStroke(); if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomTextGradient(); else applyRandomTextImage(); };
    const applyRandomAnimationSet = () => { applyRandomAnimation(); };

    const applyRandomMix = () => {
        applyRandomTextSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomBgSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.8)) applyRandomShapeSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.9)) applyRandomEffectSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomWebkitTextSet();
        if (getRandomBoolean(0.7)) applyRandomAnimationSet();
    };

    const applyMaxChaos = () => {
        resetAllStyles(false);
        const actions = [applyRandomTextSet, applyRandomBgSet, applyRandomShapeSet, applyRandomEffectSet, applyRandomWebkitTextSet, applyRandomAnimationSet];
        shuffleArray(actions);
        actions.forEach(fn => fn());
    };

    // --- RESET / GEÇMİŞ (History) ---

    const resetAllStyles = (clearHistory = true) => {
        currentStyles = {};
        currentAnimation = { keyframes: null };
        activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
        previewBox.removeAttribute('style');
        
        // Inputları sıfırla
        document.querySelectorAll('input, select').forEach(el => {
           if(el.type === 'color') return; // Color pickerlar iro.js ile yönetiliyor
           if(el.type === 'number') el.value = el.defaultValue || '';
           if(el.type === 'text') el.value = '';
           if(el.tagName === 'SELECT') el.selectedIndex = 0;
        });

        if (clearHistory) { styleHistory = []; historyIndex = -1; updateHistoryButtons(); }
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
    };

    const saveHistory = () => {
        const snapshot = JSON.stringify({ styles: currentStyles, animation: currentAnimation });
        if (historyIndex >= 0 && historyIndex < styleHistory.length && styleHistory[historyIndex] === snapshot) return;
        
        styleHistory = styleHistory.slice(0, historyIndex + 1);
        styleHistory.push(snapshot);
        if (styleHistory.length > MAX_HISTORY) styleHistory.shift(); else historyIndex++;
        updateHistoryButtons();
    };

    const loadHistory = (index) => {
        if (index < 0 || index >= styleHistory.length) return;
        const snapshot = JSON.parse(styleHistory[index]);
        currentStyles = snapshot.styles || {};
        currentAnimation = snapshot.animation || { keyframes: null };
        historyIndex = index;
        updateHistoryButtons();
        updatePreviewAndOutput(false);
    };

    const undo = () => { if (historyIndex > 0) loadHistory(historyIndex - 1); };
    const redo = () => { if (historyIndex < styleHistory.length - 1) loadHistory(historyIndex + 1); };

    const updateHistoryButtons = () => {
        const undoBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="undo"]');
        const redoBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="redo"]');
        if (undoBtn) undoBtn.disabled = historyIndex <= 0;
        if (redoBtn) redoBtn.disabled = historyIndex >= styleHistory.length - 1;
    };

    // --- CSS OLUŞTURMA VE ÖNİZLEME (Core Engine) ---

    const generateCssString = () => {
        const lines = [];
        // Normal stiller
        Object.entries(currentStyles).forEach(([prop, value]) => {
            if (value == null || value === '') return;
            // Medya sorguları veya pseudo-elementler için özel işlem
            if (prop.startsWith('@') || prop.startsWith(':') || prop.startsWith('#')) return; 
            
            const cssProp = prop.replace(/[A-Z]/g, m => '-' + m.toLowerCase());
            lines.push(`  ${cssProp}: ${value};`);
        });

        let css = `#preview-box {\n${lines.join('\n')}\n}`;

        // Pseudo-class ve Medya Sorgularını CSS stringine ekle (Varsa)
        Object.entries(currentStyles).forEach(([prop, value]) => {
             if (prop.startsWith(':')) {
                 css += `\n\n#preview-box${prop} {\n${value}\n}`;
             } else if (prop.startsWith('@media')) {
                 css += `\n\n${prop} {\n  #preview-box {\n${value}\n  }\n}`;
             } else if (prop.startsWith('#')) {
                 // Alt elementler için (Animated Shape Group gibi)
                 css += `\n\n${prop} {\n${value}\n}`;
             }
        });

        if (currentAnimation.keyframes) css += `\n\n${currentAnimation.keyframes}`;
        return css;
    };

    const updatePreviewAndOutput = (save = true) => {
        const styleString = generateCssString();
        cssOutput.value = styleString;

        // Preview Box'ı temizle ve yeniden uygula
        previewBox.removeAttribute('style');
        
        // Önce temizle, sonra stilleri uygula
        Object.entries(currentStyles).forEach(([prop, value]) => {
            if (prop.startsWith('@') || prop.startsWith(':') || prop.startsWith('#')) return; // Bunlar inline style'a eklenmez
            try { previewBox.style[prop] = value; } catch (e) { console.warn('Stil uygulanamadı:', prop, value); }
        });

        // Eğer HTML içeriğini değiştiren özel efektler varsa (Animated Shape Group gibi)
        // Burada basitçe innerHTML'i temizliyoruz, çünkü bu demo genellikle tek kutu üzerine kurulu.
        // Ancak Shape Group gibi kompleks yapılarda innerHTML yönetimi gerekebilir.
        if(currentStyles.display === 'flex' && Object.keys(currentStyles).some(k => k.startsWith('#shape-'))) {
             previewBox.innerHTML = '';
             for(let i=0; i<3; i++) {
                 const div = document.createElement('div');
                 div.id = `shape-${i}`;
                 div.textContent = i+1;
                 // Inline stilleri style stringinden parse etmek zor, bu yüzden basit demo
                 // Gerçek uygulamada CSS class'ı olarak eklenmeli.
                 previewBox.appendChild(div);
             }
        } else if (currentStyles.display === 'flex' && Object.keys(currentStyles).some(k => k.startsWith('#color-'))) {
            previewBox.innerHTML = '';
             for(let i=0; i<5; i++) {
                 const div = document.createElement('div');
                 div.id = `color-${i}`;
                 previewBox.appendChild(div);
             }
        } else {
            if(!previewBox.textContent.trim() || previewBox.children.length > 0) {
                 previewBox.textContent = 'K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0'; 
            }
        }

        // is-empty sınıfı kontrolü
        if (!previewBox.textContent.trim() && previewBox.children.length === 0) previewBox.classList.add('is-empty');
        else previewBox.classList.remove('is-empty');

        // Buton durumlarını güncelle
        const copyCssBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="copy-css"]');
        const downloadCssBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="download-css"]');
        const downloadHtmlBtn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="download-html"]');
        
        if(copyCssBtn) copyCssBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();
        if(downloadCssBtn) downloadCssBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();
        if(downloadHtmlBtn) downloadHtmlBtn.disabled = !styleString.trim();

        if (save) saveHistory();
    };

    // --- KOPYALA / İNDİR / YAPIŞTIR ---

    const copyCssToClipboard = () => {
        const val = cssOutput.value.trim();
        if (!val) return;
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(val).then(() => {
            const btn = document.querySelector('button[data-action="copy-css"]');
            const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
            btn.classList.add('copied');
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> Kopyalandı!';
            setTimeout(() => { btn.classList.remove('copied'); btn.innerHTML = originalText; }, 1500);
        });
    };

    const downloadFile = (filename, content, type = 'text/plain') => {
        const blob = new Blob([content], { type });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url; a.download = filename;
        document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    };

    const downloadCss = () => { downloadFile('k3n4n-style.css', cssOutput.value.trim(), 'text/css'); };
    const downloadHtml = () => {
        const html = `<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="tr"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><title>K3N4N Önizleme</title><style>${cssOutput.value.trim()}</style></head><body><div id="preview-box">K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0</div></body></html>`;
        downloadFile('k3n4n-preview.html', html, 'text/html');
    };

    const previewPastedCss = () => {
        const css = cssInputArea.value.trim();
        htmlPreviewArea.innerHTML = '';
        if (!css) { htmlPreviewArea.innerHTML = '<span class="preview-error">Önizlenecek CSS yok.</span>'; return; }
        
        // Basit regex ile {} bloğu içini al (Çok ilkel bir parser)
        const blockMatch = css.match(/\{([\s\S]*?)\}/);
        const styles = blockMatch ? blockMatch[1] : css;
        
        const previewDiv = document.createElement('div');
        previewDiv.className = 'preview-wrapper';
        const inner = document.createElement('div');
        inner.className = 'preview-element';
        inner.textContent = 'CSS Önizleme';
        inner.style.cssText = styles; // Tarayıcının cssText özelliğiyle parse et
        
        previewDiv.appendChild(inner);
        htmlPreviewArea.appendChild(previewDiv);
    };

    const addPastedCssToMain = () => {
        const css = cssInputArea.value.trim();
        if(!css) return;
        // Basitçe stil stringini alıp currentStyles'a işlemeye çalışalım
        // Not: Bu çok basit bir yaklaşımdır, karmaşık CSS'leri tam parse etmez.
        const blockMatch = css.match(/\{([\s\S]*?)\}/);
        const stylesText = blockMatch ? blockMatch[1] : css;
        
        stylesText.split(';').forEach(line => {
            const [prop, val] = line.split(':');
            if(prop && val) {
                const camelProp = prop.trim().replace(/-([a-z])/g, g => g[1].toUpperCase());
                currentStyles[camelProp] = val.trim();
            }
        });
        updatePreviewAndOutput();
    };

    // --- INITIALIZATION (Başlatma) ---

    const initColorPickers = () => {
        Object.entries(colorPickerElements).forEach(([key, cfg]) => {
            const container = document.getElementById(key); // container id = key
            const input = document.getElementById(cfg.inputId);
            if (!container || !input) return;
            
            const picker = new iro.ColorPicker(container, {
                width: 160,
                color: input.value || cfg.default,
                layout: [
                    { component: iro.ui.Box },
                    { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'hue' } },
                    { component: iro.ui.Slider, options: { sliderType: 'alpha' } },
                ]
            });
            colorPickers[key] = { instance: picker, input };

            picker.on('color:change', (color) => {
                input.value = color.hex8String;
                if (cfg.styleProp) {
                    currentStyles[cfg.styleProp] = color.hex8String;
                    debouncedUpdateAndSave();
                } else {
                    // Özel alanlar
                    if (cfg.inputId === 'textShadowColor') debouncedSetTextShadow();
                    else if (cfg.inputId === 'textStrokeColor') debouncedSetTextStroke();
                    else if (cfg.inputId === 'textFillColor') {
                        currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor = color.hex8String;
                        updatePreviewAndOutput(); saveHistory();
                    }
                }
            });
        });
    };

    const initFieldsetToggles = () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.controls fieldset legend').forEach(legend => {
            legend.addEventListener('click', () => {
                legend.parentElement.classList.toggle('expanded');
            });
        });
    };

    const initInputsBinding = () => {
        const allInputs = controlsArea.querySelectorAll('input[data-style-prop], select[data-style-prop], textarea[data-style-prop]');
        allInputs.forEach(el => {
            const prop = el.getAttribute('data-style-prop');
            const unit = el.getAttribute('data-style-unit') || '';
            const handler = () => {
                let value = el.value;
                if (unit && value !== '' && !String(value).endsWith(unit)) value = `${value}${unit}`;
                if (value === '') delete currentStyles[prop]; else currentStyles[prop] = value;
                
                if (prop === 'opacity' && opacityValueSpan) opacityValueSpan.textContent = value;
                debouncedUpdateAndSave();
            };
            el.addEventListener('input', handler);
            el.addEventListener('change', handler);
        });

        // Manuel bağlamalar
        if(animationKeyframesInput) animationKeyframesInput.addEventListener('input', debouncedHandleAnimationKeyframesChange);
        
        const txtShadowInputs = ['textShadowX', 'textShadowY', 'textShadowBlur'];
        txtShadowInputs.forEach(id => {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if(el) { el.addEventListener('input', debouncedSetTextShadow); el.addEventListener('change', debouncedSetTextShadow); }
        });
        
        const textShadowManual = document.getElementById('textShadowManual');
        if(textShadowManual) textShadowManual.addEventListener('input', () => {
             const v = textShadowManual.value.trim();
             if(v) currentStyles.textShadow = v; else delete currentStyles.textShadow;
             debouncedUpdateAndSave();
        });
        
        const textBgImg = document.getElementById('textBackgroundImageUrl');
        if(textBgImg) textBgImg.addEventListener('change', () => {
             if(textBgImg.value) setBackgroundForTextClip('image', textBgImg.value);
        });
    };

    const initButtons = () => {
        controlsArea.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const btn = e.target.closest('button');
            if (!btn) return;
            const styleTarget = btn.getAttribute('data-style-target');
            const presetTarget = btn.getAttribute('data-preset-target');
            const presetValue = btn.getAttribute('data-preset-value');
            const action = btn.getAttribute('data-action');

            if (styleTarget) {
                e.preventDefault();
                switch (styleTarget) {
                    case 'random-font': applyRandomFont(); break;
                    case 'random-color': applyRandomColor(); break;
                    case 'random-text-shadow': applyRandomTextShadow(); break;
                    case 'random-text-decoration': applyRandomTextDecoration(); break;
                    case 'random-spacing': applyRandomSpacing(); break;
                    case 'random-text-transform': applyRandomTextTransform(); break;
                    case 'random-text-align': applyRandomTextAlign(); break;
                    case 'random-bg-color': applyRandomBgColor(); break;
                    case 'random-gradient': applyRandomGradient(); break;
                    case 'random-bg-image': applyRandomBgImage(); break;
                    case 'random-bg-props': applyRandomBgProps(); break;
                    case 'random-bg-blend-mode': applyRandomBgBlendMode(); break;
                    case 'random-border': applyRandomBorder(); break;
                    case 'random-size-padding-margin': applyRandomSizePaddingMargin(); break;
                    case 'random-display-position': applyRandomDisplayPosition(); break;
                    case 'random-box-shadow': applyRandomBoxShadow(); break;
                    case 'random-opacity': applyRandomOpacity(); break;
                    case 'random-filter': applyRandomFilter(); break;
                    case 'random-transform': applyRandomTransform(); break;
                    case 'random-cursor': applyRandomCursor(); break;
                    case 'random-user-select': applyRandomUserSelect(); break;
                    case 'random-text-stroke': applyRandomTextStroke(); break;
                    case 'random-text-gradient': applyRandomTextGradient(); break;
                    case 'random-text-image': applyRandomTextImage(); break;
                    case 'random-animation': applyRandomAnimation(); break;
                    
                    // Setler
                    case 'random-text-set': applyRandomTextSet(); break;
                    case 'random-bg-set': applyRandomBgSet(); break;
                    case 'random-shape-set': applyRandomShapeSet(); break;
                    case 'random-effect-set': applyRandomEffectSet(); break;
                    case 'random-webkit-text-set': applyRandomWebkitTextSet(); break;
                    case 'random-animation-set': applyRandomAnimationSet(); break;
                    
                    // Auto Sets
                    case 'auto-generic': applyAutoGeneric(); break;
                    case 'auto-contrast-text': applyAutoContrastText(); break;
                    case 'auto-shadow': applyAutoShadow(); break;
                    case 'auto-gradient': applyAutoGradient(); break;
                    case 'auto-theme': applyAutoTheme(); break;
                    
                    case 'random-mix': applyRandomMix(); break;
                    case 'max-chaos': applyMaxChaos(); break;
                }
                updatePreviewAndOutput(); saveHistory();
            }

            if (presetTarget) {
                e.preventDefault();
                if(presetTarget === 'text-shadow') applyTextShadowPreset(presetValue);
                if(presetTarget === 'box-shadow') applyBoxShadowPreset(presetValue);
                updatePreviewAndOutput(); saveHistory();
            }

            if (action) {
                e.preventDefault();
                switch (action) {
                    case 'clear-text-shadow': delete currentStyles.textShadow; document.getElementById('textShadowManual').value = ''; break;
                    case 'clear-box-shadow': delete currentStyles.boxShadow; document.getElementById('boxShadowManual').value = ''; break;
                    case 'set-text-fill-transparent': currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor = 'transparent'; break;
                    case 'set-text-fill-currentcolor': delete currentStyles.webkitTextFillColor; break;
                    case 'clear-animation': 
                        delete currentStyles.animationName; 
                        currentAnimation.keyframes = null; 
                        if(animationKeyframesInput) animationKeyframesInput.value = ''; 
                        break;
                    case 'reset-all': resetAllStyles(true); break;
                    case 'preview-pasted-css': previewPastedCss(); break;
                    case 'add-pasted-css': addPastedCssToMain(); break;
                    case 'copy-css': copyCssToClipboard(); break;
                    case 'download-css': downloadCss(); break;
                    case 'download-html': downloadHtml(); break;
                    case 'undo': undo(); break;
                    case 'redo': redo(); break;
                }
                updatePreviewAndOutput(); saveHistory();
            }
        });
    };

    // --- BAŞLATMA KOMUTLARI ---
    
    initColorPickers();
    initFieldsetToggles();
    initInputsBinding();
    initButtons();
    
    // İlk açılış
    resetAllStyles(true);
    console.log('K3N4N V8.0 Başarıyla Yüklendi.');
});
```

// K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 (Ultimate Edition) - FULL JS
console.log('K3N4N CSS Stil Generator V8.0 Script Başlatılıyor...');
'use strict';

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    console.log('DOM Yüklendi. K3N4N V8.0 Sistemleri Çevrimiçi...');

    // --- DOM Referansları ---
    const previewBox = document.getElementById('preview-box');
    const cssOutput = document.getElementById('css-output');
    const controlsArea = document.querySelector('.controls');
    const cssInputArea = document.getElementById('cssInputArea');
    const htmlPreviewArea = document.getElementById('htmlPreviewArea');
    const opacityValueSpan = document.getElementById('opacityValue');
    const animationKeyframesInput = document.getElementById('animationKeyframes');

    // Renk Seçicileri
    const colorPickers = {}; 
    const colorPickerElements = { 
        textColorPicker: { inputId: 'textColor', styleProp: 'color', default: '#ccd6f6' },
        textShadowColorPicker: { inputId: 'textShadowColor', default: '#000000' },
        borderColorPicker: { inputId: 'borderColor', styleProp: 'borderColor', default: '#cccccc' },
        backgroundColorPicker: { inputId: 'backgroundColor', styleProp: 'backgroundColor', default: '#ffffff' },
        textStrokeColorPicker: { inputId: 'textStrokeColor', default: '#000000' },
        textFillColorPicker: { inputId: 'textFillColor', default: '#ccd6f6' },
    };

    // --- Durum (State) ---
    let currentStyles = {};
    let currentAnimation = { keyframes: null };
    let activeWebkitTextEffect = null;
    let styleHistory = [];
    let historyIndex = -1;
    const MAX_HISTORY = 50;

    // --- Yardımcı Fonksiyonlar (Helpers) ---
    const getRandomInt = (min, max) => Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
    const getRandomFloat = (min, max, precision = 1) => parseFloat((Math.random() * (max - min) + min).toFixed(precision));
    const getRandomFromList = (list) => list[Math.floor(Math.random() * list.length)];
    const getRandomBoolean = (probability = 0.5) => Math.random() < probability;
    const shuffleArray = (array) => { for (let i = array.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [array[i], array[j]] = [array[j], array[i]]; } return array; };

    // *** KRİTİK: Font Boyutu Sınırlandırma Helper'ı ***
    const clampFontSizePx = (value) => {
        if (!value) return '16px';
        let num = 16;
        if (typeof value === 'number') {
            num = value;
        } else if (typeof value === 'string') {
            const m = value.trim().match(/([\d.]+)(px|em|rem|%)?/i);
            if (m) {
                num = parseFloat(m[1]);
                const unit = (m[2] || 'px').toLowerCase();
                if (unit === 'em' || unit === 'rem') num = num * 16;
                if (unit === '%') num = 16 * (num / 100);
            }
        }
        if (num > 20) num = 20;
        if (num < 10) num = 10;
        return `${Math.round(num)}px`;
    };

    // Chroma.js ve Renk Yardımcıları
    const isValidColor = (color) => { try { return chroma.valid(color); } catch(e) { return false; } };
    const getRandomHex = () => chroma.random().hex();
    const getRandomRgbaString = (minAlpha = 0.3, maxAlpha = 0.9) => chroma.random().alpha(getRandomFloat(minAlpha, maxAlpha, 2)).css();
    
    const getContrastingColor = (bgColor = '#ffffff', lightTarget = '#FFFFFF', darkTarget = '#112240') => {
        try {
            if (!isValidColor(bgColor)) return darkTarget;
            if (typeof bgColor === 'string' && bgColor.startsWith('var(--')) {
                const computed = getComputedStyle(previewBox).getPropertyValue(bgColor.slice(4, -1)).trim();
                if (isValidColor(computed)) bgColor = computed;
                else return darkTarget;
            }
            return chroma.contrast(bgColor, lightTarget) >= 4.5 ? lightTarget : darkTarget;
        } catch (e) { return darkTarget; }
    };

    const generatePalette = (count = 3, type = 'analogous', baseColor = chroma.random()) => {
        if (!isValidColor(baseColor)) baseColor = chroma.random();
        try {
            let scaleColors;
            const options = ['analogous', 'monochromatic', 'complementary', 'triadic', 'split', 'tetradic', 'random'];
            type = options.includes(type) ? type : 'random';

            switch(type) {
                case 'analogous': scaleColors = [baseColor.set('hsl.h', '-30'), baseColor, baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+30')]; break;
                case 'monochromatic': scaleColors = chroma.scale([baseColor.darken(1.5), baseColor, baseColor.brighten(1.5)]).mode('lch').colors(count); break;
                case 'complementary': scaleColors = [baseColor, baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+180')]; break;
                case 'triadic': scaleColors = [baseColor, baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+120'), baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+240')]; break;
                case 'split': scaleColors = [baseColor, baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+150'), baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+210')]; break;
                case 'tetradic': scaleColors = [baseColor, baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+90'), baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+180'), baseColor.set('hsl.h', '+270')]; break;
                default: scaleColors = Array.from({length: Math.max(count,2)}, () => chroma.random());
            }
            if (scaleColors.length > 1 && count > scaleColors.length) {
                return chroma.scale(scaleColors).mode('lch').padding(0.1).correctLightness(true).colors(count);
            } else if (scaleColors.length > 1) {
                return chroma.scale(scaleColors).mode('lch').colors(count);
            } else {
                return scaleColors;
            }
        } catch (e) { return Array.from({length: count}, () => chroma.random().hex()); }
    };
    const adjustColor = (color, prop = 'darken', amount = 1) => { try { return isValidColor(color) ? chroma(color)[prop](amount).hex() : color; } catch(e){ return color;} };

    // CSS Değer Üreticileri
    const getRandomAngle = (allowNegative = false) => `${getRandomInt(allowNegative ? -360 : 0, 360)}deg`;
    const getRandomPercent = (min = 0, max = 100) => `${getRandomInt(min, max)}%`;
    const getRandomPixel = (min, max, allowNegative = false) => `${getRandomInt(allowNegative ? min : Math.max(0, min), max)}px`;
    
    // getRandomLength Güncellemesi: Font hariç diğer özellikler için kullanılır
    const getRandomLength = (min = 0, max = 50, units = ['px', '%', 'em', 'rem', 'vw'], allowNegative = false) => {
        const unit
